Our end-of-year deadline is coming up, and Josh Hawley needs your help to CRUSH his **end-of-year goal.**

**If we lose Josh’s seat, we can kiss any chance of taking back our Senate majority goodbye.** We’re doing everything we can to defend Missouri, but we can’t do it without you.

name: Josh
subject: Wishing you a Happy Holiday & New Year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] I want to wish you and your family a happy holiday season and a hopeful New Year. This year, I am particularly grateful for my supporters, like you, who have helped me make a difference for the hardworking people of New Jersey.

Thank you for being a part of my team and helping me to continue fighting for our hardworking Jersey families, bipartisan progress and more. I am confident we will continue this impactful work in 2024 and beyond and deliver real results to the American people.

I hope you get the love, comfort, and rest you deserve after all your hard work this year. Enjoy a merry and bright holiday season.

Yours,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ae9527f2885f4a958e0494e300506c6d&_e=QaGapZLK0WvcpV5S6Mr_l6VCQOq88_-xOUN7FIBY7ib7JnvNaThj2wW02FAj9HMQun0gBRdDaRWvx1LP_k1GN8grFwoXVAPa7Ov9pGsV6A8Q27FmZYQdKXn_yZWZYV4FU2-lHwKjGYT33TDuHcjydjZFrBUBbFLXBz71E533qmCQZHOY_lUQ_5aVxq07i1wUsJESr4cvEpEjHd6RLlhpCq7G4YfjOqTXlnnL-I0J4d1fYvEKNtvDPH4501eoBeyBkSGcFaTgESBGNUBxFM_QVLcmGTmi92Z4T55Qm7HMt5ge0HYvvZAQcUGNlzWTPxVDFMkslleCbMh4shp36fgftiKgIsHtQoM1WXzQQl2XneGw7YK16koQRUNFtVsfhlIsGTSs-NEz2MazoSVbXIWuvUd66LlTKk_yEfc9yuOId_0%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ae9527f2885f4a958e0494e300506c6d&_e=QaGapZLK0WvcpV5S6Mr_l6VCQOq88_-xOUN7FIBY7ib7JnvNaThj2wW02FAj9HMQun0gBRdDaRWvx1LP_k1GN8grFwoXVAPa7Ov9pGsV6A8Q27FmZYQdKXn_yZWZYV4FU2-lHwKjGYT33TDuHcjydjZFrBUBbFLXBz71E533qmCQZHOY_lUQ_5aVxq07i1wUsJESr4cvEpEjHd6RLlhpCq7G4YfjOqTXlnnL-I0J4d1fYvEKNtvDPH4501eoBeyBkSGcFaTgESBGNUBxFM_QVHQhEh8AzGruYwXRYMZoLw7eMaSehdRcej4DfY2z-3O1KEMgA1KRif6mRIO1OJl-13pIPrdUIYaG9kKtcWIMrCLM92-DC_41dC5MDhjzPTTCe50sLFjP4C4P73z1HBh2fYnkLdeqrgW50-GVj8VwDGs%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ae9527f2885f4a958e0494e300506c6d&_e=QaGapZLK0WvcpV5S6Mr_l6VCQOq88_-xOUN7FIBY7ib7JnvNaThj2wW02FAj9HMQun0gBRdDaRWvx1LP_k1GN8grFwoXVAPa7Ov9pGsV6A8Q27FmZYQdKXn_yZWZYV4FU2-lHwKjGYT33TDuHcjydjZFrBUBbFLXBz71E533qmCQZHOY_lUQ_5aVxq07i1wUsJESr4cvEpEjHd6RLlhpCq7G4YfjOqTXlnnL-I0J4d1fYvEKNtvDPH4501eoBeyBkSGcFaTgESBGNUBxFM_QVFz_8Ll4Nv_acrgFWHFSsTsbuMjRr3e79seQHs3Okoxd5hJ7uRz_04F9hKouqBKBlBvg-vcAiZXOrV-bbjm2FlEQO1Z0T_nCZWdS2DB0yCsjZsqlc5BuYFQyFS3OSXRyljvXY-OnPWpbjsL4xtpFKpk%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---

Hello Friend,

The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections.

If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_You may ask yourself, “What credibility does this guy have?!”_

Good question.

I led the Russia Gate investigation for the House Intelligence Committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to run the investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published- he said yes, and we did just that.

My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the DOJ/FBI investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught.

And only after leaving government service 2 years ago did I discover the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee exposing DOJ/FBI illegal acts before the FISA Court to unlawfully surveil President Trump and his campaign. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption.

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: From my family to yours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

This has been a momentous year for us, friend.

We've boosted local unions to victory, advocated for LGBTQ+ rights, fought discrimination, made our communities safer, planned outreach and community events, and so much more.

As we near the end of 2023, I find myself reflecting on my journey to get here. I went from a traumatic childhood in war torn Iran to the United States, the land of opportunity.

From studying at law school to joining the being President of LGBT Bar Association of Los Angeles during the fight against Prop 8, from West Hollywood City Council to the Mayor of West Hollywood, I couldn't have done any of it without my earliest supporters who have been there through it all...

I'm talking about my wonderful family! 💛

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231223_ss_family_img1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231223_ss_family_img1]

All the love and support they have shown me has carried me through tough times and hardship, making moments like these where we can celebrate our progress all the more special.

As always, I'm grateful for you and all the people who have shown their support for our movement.

You're the reason we can shine so brightly.

Before I go, I must share my love for my wonderful fur babies who are as much a part of the family:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231223_ss_family_img2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231223_ss_family_img2]

From my family to yours, I wish you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season.

With gratitude,

Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]

P.S. We have a big FEC deadline coming up on December 31st. If you could pitch in any amount now to help us reach our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal, it would mean the world to me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231223_ss_family_l1]

Power our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231223_ss_family_b1]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=8dc0e0c4-f6a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=8dc0e0c4-f6a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36]

name: Heather (from VPP)
subject: Before you log off, click this »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I’m hoping you’ll hear me out
| Hey folks, it’s Heather from Team VPP.

The other day we reached out to you about the opportunity to upgrade your membership to our brand new Democratic Supporter Membership.

_But unfortunately, we’re still waiting on top Democrats like you to step up to the plate!_

**So before you log off for the holidays,_I need you to see this:_**

❌ President Biden is trailing Trump in 5 out of 6 battleground swing states.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: What if I told you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — **if you knew chipping in $3 right now could help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next November... would you do it?**
What if you knew that Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election this cycle — with worse approvals than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida — and that $3 today would help us keep holding Hawley accountable to Missouri voters?
Or what if I told you that Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran on a mission to take back power for working people, is already in a _statistical tie_ with Josh Hawley in multiple recent polls — and that your $3 donation could help us take the lead?
Lucas is building this movement without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, which means the only way we’ll be able to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat is with support for everyday people just like you.
**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you add your very first donation of $3 (or more) toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce before our last major fundraising deadline of 2023 that’s just over one week from today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40483?refcode=em20231223-4445&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4445%2E614464%2El8J6dF)**

name: Don Huffines
subject: Mexican president says he’ll fight new Texas law empowering Texas officials to deport illegals
body:
I love Christmas—such a great opportunity to be with our family. Most importantly, we get to celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-jy/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-r/) FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Noah Betz; 281-928-2089
[noah@bluestonecreatives.com](mailto:noah@bluestonecreatives.com) Hello fellow patriot!I love Christmas--such a great opportunity to be with our family.Most importantly, we get to celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.From my family to yours, I hope you have a wonderful Christmas and a restful holiday! I have a short email for y'all today - below is a link to my latest radio segment with Kenny Webster on ending birthright citizenship and passing school choice in Texas.Additionally, the president of Mexico says he'll fight the new Texas law empowering Texas officials to deport illegals. **Can Texas End Birthright Citizenship?** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-y/)
# The Huffines Liberty Foundation has a whitepaper coming out soon on ending birthright citizenship, which is one of the main catalysts for illegals to come to America.
[_LISTEN: My discussion with Kenny Webster on how birthright citizenship is one of the main catalysts for illegals to come to America._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-j/) **ICYMI: Mexican president says he 'll fight new Texas law empowering Texas officials to deport illegals** Hopefully Texans (& Texas officials) wake up to the obvious reality that the cartel-controlled Mexican government is our enemy.Which country has done more to undermine American sovereignty, security, & culture than the cartel-controlled Mexican government? Fentanyl is killing Americans. Human trafficking is ripping families apart. Meanwhile, Texans are spending billions annually to educate illegals.[_THROWBACK:_](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-t/)_[ Kenny Webster and I discuss ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-i/)_[_how the cartel-controlled Mexican government is our #1 enemy._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-h/) **Can We Have School Choice and Lower Property Taxes?** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-k/) Texas needs to get the government out of the way and put competition back in the school system.Education freedom is the main equalizer that gives all Texans an equal opportunity to succeed.Rich folks can change their zip code or go to private schools; it's bizarre the Leftists and RINOs are committed to ensuring the poor remain poor._[WATCH: My discussion with Kenny Webster on the fight for school choice in Texas](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-u/)_[ _._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-o/) **We Need to Trust in Jesus** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-b/) This Christmas, we need to trust in Jesus and His plan and be appreciative of all that we have._[LISTEN: ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-n/)_[_Kenny Webster and I discuss the big picture of Christmas and the fight for liberty._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-p/) May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield, and Merry Christmas!!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. Follow me on [Facebook](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-x/), [Instagram](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-c/), and [Twitter](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-q/) for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by [clicking here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-a/).Want me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? [Click here to fill out my request form.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-f/) [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT TO SAVE TEXAS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-z/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-v/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-e/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-s/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-g/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-w/) | **[ABOUT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-yd/) | [NEWS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-yh/) | [EVENTS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-yu/) | [SPEAKER/MEDIA REQUEST](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-jl/) | [DONATE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-jr/)** [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-vhhthiy-17329976-yuddtktydi-jj) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-vhhthiy-yuddtktydi-jt/)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: A headline I didn’t want to see before Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Very sad!| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=79e648e885df4a769d1776fe4172f01a&_e=EiuEP98yk4R9txVOYmnkMRCX6Hyn0-zF2wGU4m96u8V-VXxjnosgyjrEzqeXq7OqSA5WPN6jnXb4BgS6cH_RcZiqRY7_XvEMjiOe_Ww3tjLSpeDLhJ3A_9yNrV1dongHTjzhWeei-J187ImOw5KqiDbYZDhFd2YpPsBcA81p9DtcMiVhom5DqKp3NmmhbsfuFKMdSpo1UotMNNq4QeSUOvLYG9XBzmSV8fibCdy3LfjEmZ07eGc6-l2TTU-pZL0zLaVVldjymp5k0R77oYz5pBE2Ce9UzE7dexDhCGWq2ZhYUFVCWFhJqVrMIYlF7edrw6y5xRbvhNdWi8IMkBVZfQZywevCa_TPUG6NusHokaELBtkgA_BEjzf8JRxG88SS7hLneGJHQlHAi0mVmPTpBKWRVwKzy-eAp6tUIJYpcDjlk8dd9w0pnwWVZ7SEpmEvkqTg8wkxQd_X1ldg0o6JcRKp_NKGTx-PU806TX74RkCB64pTLdjh7kgQOpvxWYAI)
---
| | Patriot,

---
It was truly sad to see a headline right before Christmas showing that American pessimism is climbing to its highest levels.
---
Just 4 years ago, our country was thriving like never before.
---
But under Crooked Joe Biden, we are sadly now a Nation in Decline.
---
Perhaps worst of all, pessimism goes against the core of what it means to be an American. We are optimists by nature. Hope has guided us since the moment we declared our Independence from the largest empire on the face of the planet.
---
So, in keeping with the Christmas spirit, I am writing to you today with a message of **_hope_**.
---
You have my solemn word that as soon as I place my hand on the Bible and take the Oath of Office as your 47th President, I will work tirelessly to revive our declining nation, bring American optimism back to life, and do everything in my power to Make America Great Again!
---
It’s right before Christmas, so if you cannot donate anything due to the very corrupt people in charge of America right now, please don’t even think twice. This is a time to take care of your family. I don’t want you to incur any cost that you cannot afford.
---

clean_body: Very sad!| | | | | Patriot, It was truly sad to see a headline right before Christmas showing that American pessimism is climbing to its highest levels. Just 4 years ago, our country was thriving like never before. But under Crooked Joe Biden, we are sadly now a Nation in Decline. Perhaps worst of all, pessimism goes against the core of what it means to be an American. We are optimists by nature. Hope has guided us since the moment we declared our Independence from the largest empire on the face of the planet. So, in keeping with the Christmas spirit, I am writing to you today with a message of hope. You have my solemn word that as soon as I place my hand on the Bible and take the Oath of Office as your 47th President, I will work tirelessly to revive our declining nation, bring American optimism back to life, and do everything in my power to Make America Great Again! It’s right before Christmas, so if you cannot donate anything due to the very corrupt people in charge of America right now, please don’t even think twice. This is a time to take care of your family. I don’t want you to incur any cost that you cannot afford. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. name: Qasim Rashid
subject: Support Qasim Rashid: Protect reproductive rights now!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=34581%2E120265%2EIZNVAZ ]Qasim for Congress

Hi, Friend,

I'm reaching out to share a cause that needs your support – protecting
reproductive rights for all.

Throughout my career, I've advocated for women's rights, working with
nonprofits to expand national reproductive health access. Now that I’m
running for Congress in Illinois’ 11th district, I am determined to:

* Support the Women’s Health Protection Act of 2023 to overturn abortion
bans nationally
* Stop Big Tech from sharing health info that prevents abortion access
across state lines
* Sign the Right to Contraception Act to keep states from banning
certain contraceptives

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4289?t=1002&akid=34581%2E120265%2EIZNVAZ ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

While Illinois has legal protections, we cannot ignore the growing threat
in Republican-controlled states that disproportionately affects Black and
brown women and those unable to travel for care.

I believe that access to abortion and bodily autonomy is a human right. By
contributing to my 100% people-powered campaign, you can help ensure that
every person has the right to make decisions about their reproductive
health.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4289?t=1003&akid=34581%2E120265%2EIZNVAZ ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

Thank you for your support - it is crucial to turn these promises into
action.

Sincerely,

— Qasim Rashid

Donate to our campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qr-em-footer?t=1004&refcode2=34581_120265_IZNVAZ&akid=34581%2E120265%2EIZNVAZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=34581%2E120265%2EIZNVAZ
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=34581%2E120265%2EIZNVAZ

**This must be wrong.**

I have been reviewing the names for our official NRSC Roll of Honor, and your name is NOWHERE to be found. _How could you abandon us at such a critical time?_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: 2023 December e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2023 December e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
| **Happy holidays to you and yours**
---
| Dear friends,

As the holidays draw closer and we approach 2024, I am so thankful to serve as your San Mateo County Supervisor. I am also thankful for my wife Ana and son Piero, who both remind me every day how fortunate I am to have family by my side.

Piero was born during my first year in office and watching him grow up is the joy of our lives. He loves to read, play sports and has a love for life that is truly inspiring. I am also grateful to my staff for helping me to address the needs of my constituents in San Mateo County and for creating policy that will improve the lives of all county residents.

Some policies I sponsored this year and are now county law include one of the strictest anti-tobacco ordinances in the state that severely fines retailers for selling prohibited nicotine products and selling any tobacco products to minors; a guaranteed income pilot program for non-minor dependents transitioning out of foster care; and the Microenterprise Home Kitchen Operations ordinance which allows home cooks to start their own businesses and legally sell hot food dishes out of their homes with the potential to earn up to $100,000 a year.
---
I’m proud to say MEHKO has created 32 new businesses in the county including the Pearl Kitchen and the Baking Endeavor in Daly City.

I am also honored to announce a significant one-time grant of district-discretionary Measure K funds of $75,000 I granted to the Daly City/Colma Chamber of Commerce. This strategic investment will not only sustain its crucial operations but also establish a pivotal business resource center.

I also awarded the city of Brisbane a $200,000 grant in Measure K district-discretionary funds to replace the aging boiler at the community pool — a significant consumer of fossil fuels — with cutting-edge electric heat pump water heaters.

As I finish my seventh year in office, I am honored to be a member of a Board of Supervisors that has made historic investments in reducing homelessness, creating affordable housing, removing guns from our streets, making historical investments in mental health services, and protecting our environment.

As the year comes to an end, I’d like to thank you all for taking the time to read my monthly newsletters and for your support.

Happy holidays and happy new year from my family to yours!
---
| **I’m proud to be honored by the California Alliance for Jobs** I was so honored to be proclaimed the Regional Leadership Champion by the California Alliance for Jobs at a special reception at Westlake Joes’s in Daly City Monday, December 4. When government works with our business community and unions, we have the power to train the next generation of residents seeking construction careers. Investing in job-creating infrastructure is a proven strategy to change lives in our communities.

Special thanks to California Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis, state Sen. Scott Wiener, Assemblymember Diane Papan and San Francisco Assessor Joaquin Torres for speaking on the value of working together to promote job creation and training in the state of California.

Thanks also to Metropolitan Transportation Commission Executive Director Andrew Fremier, SFO General Manager Ivar Satero and other transportation leaders for advancing a 21st Century vision for the Bay Area and beyond and the investments in infrastructure that will make it happen.

Special shout out to John Duggan of Joe’s of Westlake, Chris Gruwell and Joshua Arce for making it happen.

Representing over 2,000 heavy construction companies and 80,000 union construction workers from Bakersfield to the Oregon border, the California Alliance for Jobs (CAJ) is a unique labor-management partnership that advocates for responsible investments in public infrastructure projects.

CAJ keeps California’s people and economy moving as the state’s population grows by focusing on improving water systems, expanding transportation networks and increasing the access and quality of our public infrastructure.

To learn more go to: [https://www.rebuildca.org/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=86dd8d51b1&e=c0babbc643)
---
---
| **
County funds major flood and climate adaptation project with $15 million** When Lake Merced overflows, it floods 5 hours later in unincorporated Broadmoor Village and Daly City, with the damage sometimes being extensive to properties and vehicles.

This is a problem I have been advocating to fix since my time serving on the Daly City Council starting back in 2009 and I’m proud to announce San Mateo County has invested $15 million in this very important climate mitigation infrastructure project.

As part of the Vista Grande Project, Daly City, the lead agency on the project, will expand the capacity of the Vista Grande tunnel in order to better manage conveyance of stormwater to the Pacific Ocean. These efforts would reduce uncontrolled overflows from the Vista Grande Canal into Lake Merced, while achieving a sustained increase in Lake Merced water levels, improving storm water quality, and providing further restoration of the drainage basin's natural hydrology.

It's a partnership between the North San Mateo County Sanitation District, the San Francisco Public Utilities Commission, which is pitching in $35 million for the project, and Caltrans, which has committed another $3.6 million to the project. The National Parks Service and other regulatory agencies have been involved with the approvals since it involves Fort Funston and the project should get started in 2025.
---
| **
$147 million Wellness Center to address health care needs of underserved north county residents**

The Board of Supervisors just committed $145 million toward the construction of a new health campus to deliver primary patient care for residents in north San Mateo County, a traditionally underserved population.

The 77,000 square-foot South San Francisco Wellness Center will be a new health center and office building which will expand the San Mateo County Health System’s ability to deliver health care services beyond its main campus in the city of San Mateo.

The Wellness Center will house a medical clinic, other county departments and Aging and Adult Services, which care for older and dependent adults, including abuse prevention, public guardian and authority, in-home care, nutritious meals and more.

The three-story clinic will provide primary and pediatric care, express care, dental and optometry services under federal guidelines; women, infants and children health care services; a multi-purpose conference area that can also operate as an Emergency Response Center; and two floors of office space.

This wellness center will serve the health care needs of north county residents for generations to come and I can’t wait to cut the ribbon on it when it opens to the public.
---
| **
County grant supports domestic violence awareness**

A new documentary I funded with a $75,000 district-discretionary Measure K grant has just been released by the Ariana Mae Hatami Foundation called the “Spirit of Ariana” that you can watch here: www.spiritofariana.com.

It’s a sequel to a 2020 documentary I funded called “Message from Ariana,” a film to inform our community how to recognize the signs and dangers of domestic violence.

“Message from Ariana” was created in collaboration with the San Mateo County Board of Education, the San Mateo Department of Justice, and others; it is currently being utilized throughout the county in high schools, community colleges, CORA, as well as the County of San Mateo District Attorney’s Office, Victim Services Division.

The sequel, which also covers the reality of human trafficking, will be used to reinforce insight to prevention of violence while at the same time will provide hope and healing for the survivors and hopefully save lives.

Intimate partner violence impacts 1 out of 3 women in the world. This devastating loss reminds us that we must continue efforts to create more tools and resources for the survivors of domestic abuse and allies to recognize the signs of domestic abuse.

Ariana Mae Hatami was killed on December 17, 2016 by a man she was living in who was also her coworker. In August of that same year, Ariana was struck twice in the face by the man who was later convicted of misdemeanor domestic violence.

Ariana’s parents formed the foundation in her honor with a mission statement that reads: Transforming a heart-shattering tragedy into hope for victims of violence. To learn more about San Mateo County’s domestic violence response go here: https://www.smcgov.org/hsa/domestic-violence.

**Measure K Oversight Committee seeking member from District 5**

The Measure K Oversight Committee has a vacant seat to fill for residents in my supervisorial District 5.

The Measure K Oversight Committee ensures the completion of, and reviews the results of, an annual audit of the Measure K sales and use tax revenues received by the County, reviews and recommends appropriate metrics to assess the impact of Measure K funds and prepares an annual report. The Committee does not make funding recommendations. Members meet at least twice a year and is not compensated.

The direct link to the online application is here: [https://www.smcgov.org/bnc/application-boards-commissions-and-committees](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=29f88bd3fc&e=c0babbc643)

Go here for a link to all county commission vacancies and to apply: [https://www.smcgov.org/bnc/vacancies](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1c9443ee53&e=c0babbc643)
---
| **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=02beb861ec&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org). ** **
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1614de2d32&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e7db718567&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=07dfa4d017&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e13ee1d9d2&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org) In friendship,
David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=d64ebffc8b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=d64ebffc8b).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37279%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eX4w0BFBYfd%2fM%2bX4A%2b8z3w&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FiEXAA87R3KTJKER854dDQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37271%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1wQRZsFXgHW6%2f8bbYMod%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37272%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f%2bRF%2fqsItbcHCBGE%2fzce9g&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: Trump’s Secret: “Food Rations Start Friday”
body:

It isn’t a nuclear attack.

It isn’t a chemical attack.

And it isn’t another virus.

According to war hero, white house insider, and purple heart recipient Teddy Daniels - this attack is a “new kind of warfare” that will “starve America into submission”.

Listen up... Teddy Daniels is not only a man that I trust - he’s a man I have tremendous admiration for.

And Mr. Daniels has just released an [EMERGENCY DOCUMENTARY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688740%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7EtkDwtXFlFAOy8Vn458Og&sysid=1) that not only proves America is on the cusp of the greatest food shortage in recorded history...

Plus, in Mr. Daniels’ shocking documentary, you’ll also discover:

As you might know, I consider myself to be a man who can survive almost anything.

Afraid for my family. Afraid for my friends. And afraid for YOU.

More urgently, when you [watch Teddy’s EMERGENCY documentary right now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688742%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bmhUWUQ4RYcLqbKcrGZFqg&sysid=1) - you’ll immediately realize that his report will be deleted by the powers that be as soon as they become aware of it.

name: American Defense News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm23p5v78aeuhm3dg36648n0hqoulklggghi6cs0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zon2msqup9sco4k362rsf2gibo66j41d2nq7sa0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg8ng2ll2qfilr5d1ua1ibtcf6uvta00v41bft9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt3s22t5hqc5kmphh99vkh53fkcfr7rntbr2mdpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl3h00dm0oonrjq94bljsegoj5ksp0f0v93li51o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuvuns5ah3vcc946u6s80v16orbvdvs3lctave28_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9uagi461uvbh79snavl7alf0ouid50fsklru53o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuk9kqej7sjckobc5j069645p398rbbh72h7tm1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6apr2c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4mjct3jqvq705r4h413m0j6pe9vk8mt7bdfsmng_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor6c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv4ajkorifumu5j5c3vt4keerb55fapfcdjc4kdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor6c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ltss61hvob0uvqhnbutuopufh3h4vg3co49neg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor6c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkhq8cn6vmgtm492fihndnqm77fot8pf59cc9k0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

---

Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo77s4p90ql7eh5jdcgecb555ej64v9pkbjs7ir8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor1chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk6dmdigud6qabp104rtis20cjgoudkkft5bth6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor1chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zulmi87oc1mm0j2lmh4e2716gs62cpgpa6ne3gho_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor1chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcpjhp770c7r14vku3nsk873cufpodgikcnq53p8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i6aor1chh2bs)

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Trump’s Secret: “Food Rations Start Friday”
body:
Beijing’s long anticipated assault on America isn’t an EMP...

Beijing’s long anticipated assault on America isn’t an EMP...

It isn’t a nuclear attack.

It isn’t a chemical attack.

And it isn’t another virus.

According to war hero, white house insider, and purple heart recipient Teddy Daniels - this attack is a “new kind of warfare” that will “starve America into submission”.

Listen up... Teddy Daniels is not only a man that I trust - he’s a man I have tremendous admiration for.

And Mr. Daniels has just released an [EMERGENCY DOCUMENTARY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37288%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uwiar5ue4Q3ZiY%2fy3PpXlQ&sysid=1) that not only proves America is on the cusp of the greatest food shortage in recorded history...

But reveals rock solid evidence that this “Final Famine” could start on Friday.

Plus, in Mr. Daniels’ shocking documentary, you’ll also discover:
*Why Every Patriot MUST HAVE 3 Feet of Copper Wire In Their Home, To Be Properly Prepared For This “Final Famine”
*How An Accused Spy In Our Government (Codenamed: “The Red Dragon”) Has Paved The Way For This Food Shortage. Plus Her Secret Identity Exposed!
*What President Trump whispered to Teddy in their secret meeting - and why it means that Stockpiling Food Won’t Save You or Your Family...
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37289%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HIRYqa2GU57yynu2ObkIPg&sysid=1)
Watch Teddy Daniels’ EXPLOSIVE documentary right now - because folks, this is NOT a drill.
As you might know, I consider myself to be a man who can survive almost anything.

But the deadly evidence Mr. Daniels presents, and the incredibly unique nature of this threat... even has ME afraid.

Afraid for my family. Afraid for my friends. And afraid for YOU.

More urgently, when you [watch Teddy’s EMERGENCY documentary right now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37280%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OPBcmHX1TgZ0GPKYpDgCig&sysid=1) - you’ll immediately realize that his report will be deleted by the powers that be as soon as they become aware of it.

Watch it now please.

Paul Grabowski

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688858%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QgLT0KDSmxDpoVZXX7pvwA&sysid=1)

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688850%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XNO%2bOF4RCmuItRu3Zx44tw&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688850%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XNO%2bOF4RCmuItRu3Zx44tw&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zen466b9ovnajb5nlfiemsipm3m4frlo65sqojng_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmk4pimjfjovn5v5pimkmfltuomcc5supe0ma08g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj6c9h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq84t9suful13cplu3l3imog2221f7nkv8e4m36g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj6c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb03bpkgioe0l604rapb8u1gc8fjmdpgmadcjic0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj6c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zec9bd7hva7tp38m9ithr4ri3b69ueq4s3e7m998_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69pj4cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zis52cb4tf8i1pnc4kmo5lavqeqe4vjlbf9i40qo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69pj4cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0ibd8c3p4u7rotchd8fmgorqdjcaph44t46gb6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69pj4cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn1uvr5lllo7qoktnsbcpqg9rr5np2gu6noncv8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69pj4cdh2bs)

subject: Trump’s Secret: “FoodRations Start Friday”
body:
Beijing's long anticipated assault on America isn't an EMP...

It isn't a nuclear attack.

It isn't a chemical attack.

And it isn't another virus.

According to war hero, white house insider, and purple heart recipient Teddy Daniels - this attack is a "new kind of warfare" that will "starve America into submission".

Listen up... Teddy Daniels is not only a man that I trust - he's a man I have tremendous admiration for.

And Mr. Daniels has just released an [EMERGENCY DOCUMENTARY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjiok3102rqb1ombikpr6mikp8j4u9vtoqn5fklo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj6cth2bs) that not only proves America is on the cusp of the greatest food shortage in recorded history...

But reveals rock solid evidence that this "Final Famine" could start on Friday.

Plus, in Mr. Daniels' shocking documentary, you'll also discover:

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zti99e9lmhfoel33ahv98q5lm2mn30003oh2teu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj1cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlj6g12asqmbg7vg2katoe0eov76gilqm5n3aul0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj1cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5bqmced3m1k2dv9udmfh997mbgus5mplilqdlfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj1cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0taih5q99pichecuqmgijhdql9sma0e0ooob78_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5i69oj1cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Your America
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37296%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NDGiRxm4ryt7V9XBqNli%2bg&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37297%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=48N9%2b%2b3ZUhYDpPUpIAPcRw&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37298%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K0M8M0z7KxxYBy5g20eisg&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37299%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UMutnI6AsCdNF3CLxHCfoA&sysid=1)

subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z053ipu10uiu2a41cjm29qkemngamgv6dldesmg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73cjh2bs)

| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbf24ag882p7k991j2cgcos853ot08hd0aof22s0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73cjh2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zieoao8s2pihbt2kpo05uq6vdg3kfba0mhmrmeu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73cjh2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr8pla1hj4i73siumhlgkoerbm6mbbhc6u9gluqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73cjh2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlmisenidp3mk7gnc2p45ugtb5m3bgqeh1f70d4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o76c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuk2clf4jkvui10j4pdjfqckh2inuctj8t8oaqh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o76c3h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0d69intjgbhrqsgqt113sbfavr1f8ujibl29d0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o76c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z65fo78090ogbq9g6abds2qn5569jg8e6e71a88o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o76c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |
