subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0vjk0ngm8cmbkn7r36apsoqeb3jcgghb99uspjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73c9h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgu4p3mmfeedgmemi0k8j8pnpegmt78fl15dcvgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73c9h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrvn04n5jb2hemv8ds1ri7t8rc5pai2teh0f9jg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73c9h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsn4sojom7j1nks34jc295tb33ocuq15fvl64o0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h64o73c9h2bs)

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fbc594ef7d5724e824efe70466954660a27ed8923df7ca4b9a1c1d76bb6e5af60f63bf9485694d1741b206293a7f12bd8b1a7a88ce116ae301251df25e8aef75874412a2f4528391358e1b97b18b03c

Friend,

It's almost Christmas, so we wanted to share some good news with you!

Here on Team DeSantis, we've relied on our donors to drive us forward at an unbeatable pace all year. And they have. That's why, we like to share a token of our thanks each week by sending them an exclusive behind-the scenes report of how we've put their generous contributions to good use.

This week, we wanted to include you in our report so you could get an inside look at all the good news before we kick off election year together.

Below is your report. *Remember: you can always
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219
join our donor distribution list by giving any amount you can afford! Our donors are the foundation of our team.

Merry Christmas!

Team DeSantis

Your exclusive Investor Report is ready to view 🗒️ 🎄

>From everyone here on our campaign to you, thank you for your continued support. After you get a chance to review your donor-exclusive report of what our campaign has been up to over the past week, we hope you get the chance to spend some time with your family. Happy holidays!

BOOTS ON THE GROUND IN IOWA

This week, Ron DeSantis outcampaigned everyone by being boots-on-the-ground all over Iowa for 6 DAYS STRAIGHT. *With just a couple of weeks before the critical Iowa Caucus, he didn't waste a second.* Here are the main attractions you may have missed:

Congressman Chip Roy of Texas jumped on the trail in Iowa with Ron DeSantis to spread the word about why he's his choice to lead our country.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

"So proud to be in Iowa campaigning for Ron DeSantis with Iowa’s great Governor Kim Reynolds — sharing his clear vision to restore freedom & prosperity for American families & demonstrating the backbone to deliver it." - Congressman Chip Roy

Gover Kevin Stitt of Oklahoma ALSO came over to Iowa to share with Iowans why Ron DeSantis has his full support and endorsement.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9019483c26f5186fb39c937d6f4539c85a248ebb09f268991fec52fd27fafb2c52270ef7734496d748a92f8a08c62257f

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9019483c26f5186fb39c937d6f4539c85a248ebb09f268991fec52fd27fafb2c52270ef7734496d748a92f8a08c62257f
Watch the live-stream of the event!

"The reason I’m here and the reason I’m endorsing Governor DeSantis is, I’ve watched how he leads… DeSantis does not back down. He is a leader that will do what he says. He will get the job done." - Governor Kevin Stitt

Governor Kim Reynolds joined Ron DeSantis, Casey DeSantis, and the kids for a packed town hall in Iowa. As one of the most popular governors in the country, the people of Iowa are following her lead and lining up by the tens of thousands to caucus for Ron DeSantis.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

SANTA ENDORSES RON DESANTIS? 🎅

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

Bonus! Wondering how the DeSantises are spending family time out on the trail? As parents, they're making sure they don't miss a moment. Thanks to your support, we're getting closer and closer to getting these family values back in the White House.

As always, thank you! As we close in on the Iowa Caucus, your support is going further than ever. We know we couldn't do this without you!

Merry Christmas!

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219
Support Ron DeSantis for President

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a98c5babd82712ab421bffd2a32bd2151904ddf791b00ffd55744e4641a26696648f9d7933b71e52522aa7cad0060fbb35
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=679dd9a3d5e5b8a9dcfb195397937de5c2f2acdb8cc1edf0ad3ccbdab53bc3de0d552a680a5caa752f51f1ea51559f7b7fa5fdb5bec12219

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: American Action News
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdcn4i89b2b14asvit0fhhnut67883vsidippb48_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66ob6cdh2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvukav9030i5lsut0gove939umt75c70dt0cg5vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66ob6cdh2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ktkdut3t1r61snuum5grl0hr5f4e2ciq46p23o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66ob6cdh2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zel1c78m5ijmec5bvb22in36kgs6gokvve5hiido_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66ob6cdh2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvq7vbjqib0ppg944vuv3upd5kbfvnbj5hl94bho_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66o75cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0e1l5g1ef1q36t3bii756gliedm43qumj1djtj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66o75cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqehca210d32ft4n0gu3ja93d48lhc028n5903ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66o75cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs5tfnj3jtk6rtllpm90pvkrc8p1upfu7vvbd7ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5h66o75cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

No on certifying President Biden's victory in 2020 **_LGBTQ issues:_**
No on the Matthew Shepard & James Byrd Hate Crimes Prevention Act
No on recognizing gay marriage nationally, and sought to ban it in California
He publicly outed a former Democratic opponent _**Women’s rights: **_
No on the right to Contraception Act
No on the Violence Against Women Act
No on the Equal Rights Amendment
No on the Fair Pay Act _**Sensible gun laws: **_
No on assault weapons ban
No on expanding background checks
No on the Protecting Our Kids Act
Yes to expand conceal and carry laws
Yes to protect firearms manufacturers from lawsuits _**The environment:**_
No on the Inflation Reduction Act which made historic investments in clean energy
No on protecting people from toxic incinerators
No on recovering America’s wildlife
No on investing in transportation and water infrastructure
No on cracking down on oil company price gouging **I've said this before, and I still mean it: Lives are at stake in the coming 2024 elections. LGBTQ+ rights are at stake. Our democracy is at stake. name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FIa-SxrKMIJmZzrHaDI5GQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnarooP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyNFcDc3BjQgplg_EMiGXmVp4LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FIa-SxrKMIJmZzrHaDI5GQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnarooP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyNFcDc3BjQgplg_EMiGXmVp4LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FIa-SxrKMIJmZzrHaDI5GQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnarooP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyNFcDc3BjQgplg_EMiGXmVp4LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FIa-SxrKMIJmZzrHaDI5GQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnarooP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyNFcDc3BjQgplg_EMiGXmVp4LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/e4DH9kVa9xfmOrh7evEKkQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnarooP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWD8QyIZeZWngtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hq7z-A1rxuwMefp6HfHhEA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnarooP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplg_EMiGXmVp4LUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=654e3070d3f745fda00dcc8b31a10369&_e=av3f5_v9yt7o7MPuJ1IcpgkvbpbYW4aZM1cUCnHcwRin7YMFt-oI_RDI1-f1bqiqJ_UkXF8L2rbPi4eAXAFu-w6new9iYbb-B6Lth25WwMASGF8kbh6M3dG4RqqoneNv3GsLqtpjo3QAO3H9pyTfld8WgnPW5md7Hmfj6PPl58zwOOSQq-_NWlPwY0az-4vLtJFG4JpcPg2IhteiXpMPpoR07lgCc-BlDTul6PIB3zX_vlU66HcufSDXzF-uABBtl0_IQlllRj8o4ZIwBFFvAVDgTiWJaXA-It_oC7W2i0_SQnRIj8yblK-_6ohKaEO9hC6Gi4bm_O8FF77Mv9sEsnNE7aIim3W9L8hI6L129ok%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=654e3070d3f745fda00dcc8b31a10369&_e=av3f5_v9yt7o7MPuJ1IcpgkvbpbYW4aZM1cUCnHcwRin7YMFt-oI_RDI1-f1bqiqJ_UkXF8L2rbPi4eAXAFu-w6new9iYbb-B6Lth25WwMASGF8kbh6M3dG4RqqoneNv3GsLqtpjo3QAO3H9pyTfld8WgnPW5md7Hmfj6PPl58zwOOSQq-_NWlPwY0az-4vLtJFG4JpcPg2IhteiXpMPpiCBxz8lHh7Ltxe9ZLObm5FinnyzNsUy_NEzd_xE68p0fsoGCsec3AyuwWSsdfc-os_oPNVxzMoui6bQxA1NjzjuMspd2S5fDCeSuPo0EBkyInKzwqNWh6bADcCjcmqHi2bmP9X7AYqGZYJugN39aLI%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=654e3070d3f745fda00dcc8b31a10369&_e=av3f5_v9yt7o7MPuJ1IcpgkvbpbYW4aZM1cUCnHcwRin7YMFt-oI_RDI1-f1bqiqJ_UkXF8L2rbPi4eAXAFu-w6new9iYbb-B6Lth25WwMASGF8kbh6M3dG4RqqoneNv3GsLqtpjo3QAO3H9pyTfld8WgnPW5md7Hmfj6PPl58zwOOSQq-_NWlPwY0az-4vLtJFG4JpcPg2IhteiXpMPppYiZPpRNxqoremoTNDloWNf36ZrO229J8ddKqo1whK4BdPXxNdAZqDPtooCnLwUfVOAT6LtQBNm77Az5x1TYV0KXs2yD7oAKy0LZ_0YQ26hX0y2WmOEVYvScesakRIRInR9suHCa_x4uFWiQ0eY7sk%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=654e3070d3f745fda00dcc8b31a10369&_e=av3f5_v9yt7o7MPuJ1IcpgkvbpbYW4aZM1cUCnHcwRin7YMFt-oI_RDI1-f1bqiqJ_UkXF8L2rbPi4eAXAFu-w6new9iYbb-B6Lth25WwMASGF8kbh6M3dG4RqqoneNv3GsLqtpjo3QAO3H9pyTfld8WgnPW5md7Hmfj6PPl58zwOOSQq-_NWlPwY0az-4vLtJFG4JpcPg2IhteiXpMPpky59fpaN8Oavs1QbIkpNrRokkNnqu9Xi6zmyO78NpPR3dOZ9JEUbXrF_CmlXpE3BU3dcXeWSU_hnDa99XQ9T62S7ghtO3mQYlP9oYrYdhih5VK0xbI0BOzg6NtlyLJywBEiFMf8OISyi5poR3Uypg4%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message fromDefend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa64198763b4691a0fb58821a90f834&_e=JQn4c35lxIuXz6ztEhz4LZ5wx4Kg7oQdPQGkReLvSN_dPY-lIHcwjWOOETctS0zBk9pF5-kgndzjbrlnpy4L6acp0eTUTBLmfmHQIbMrp8s2mVlDEuSUDOHdrgVFDS9qp5OKDcR-ire122eTvP2rg-KyOhN_4ZUQ7fBdxvgTQGEnd10Fy66ADiVm8sYC_GS-KccvAdZ4ehJtM8B0VB-c_i6v-xcFAK_CtXkfjTRNJ6Dj32YLxISC5kI1X7MRqjwVQo5Fqf4UlJ3Ldin4crkaLjV_S0z6RV9SS2nOv9DUnliBQDnL7dM6EsSEV3fw7pb_fX1klp4x26n3M66gfQhvQKk3yLyrMQIiIgFynTKq32kjM6Lgxl8UyXR5fWhahFBgFpyrSLXl_T-QIjUTVDhPfE8tEeXDSTC2uTuNsgq3eTAjHoJQmwAT-lLEaR13cOqK)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa64198763b4691a0fb58821a90f834&_e=JQn4c35lxIuXz6ztEhz4LZ5wx4Kg7oQdPQGkReLvSN_dPY-lIHcwjWOOETctS0zBk9pF5-kgndzjbrlnpy4L6acp0eTUTBLmfmHQIbMrp8s2mVlDEuSUDOHdrgVFDS9qp5OKDcR-ire122eTvP2rg-KyOhN_4ZUQ7fBdxvgTQGEnd10Fy66ADiVm8sYC_GS-KccvAdZ4ehJtM8B0VB-c_i6v-xcFAK_CtXkfjTRNJ6Dj32YLxISC5kI1X7MRqjwVQo5Fqf4UlJ3Ldin4crkaLiPGcL-TRreqGlIOxBMsNI-GVO48IYqnsalI0YvcmR7f941EUHHqAbz9WMgBY34E7FtWeyaYKx8HecncFJx4GSM6Q-cAw8XiQkt1znDYzR-kCDL7EdMcZv9eI9zAzRiTdUXtW3bwnB3acntXtYhnQzSxBaZVnkB3fxZexEF9lVQo)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa64198763b4691a0fb58821a90f834&_e=JQn4c35lxIuXz6ztEhz4LZ5wx4Kg7oQdPQGkReLvSN_dPY-lIHcwjWOOETctS0zBk9pF5-kgndzjbrlnpy4L6acp0eTUTBLmfmHQIbMrp8s2mVlDEuSUDOHdrgVFDS9qp5OKDcR-ire122eTvP2rg-KyOhN_4ZUQ7fBdxvgTQGEnd10Fy66ADiVm8sYC_GS-KccvAdZ4ehJtM8B0VB-c_i6v-xcFAK_CtXkfjTRNJ6Dj32YLxISC5kI1X7MRqjwVQo5Fqf4UlJ3Ldin4crkaLhfvXUykpks3CQmOQYXAakcqByS3409h4TgBp9v_AJVStWS_3TPdQ36XzTEIJ5GYhEJ3-hyq6NePnjiPim-3-kpjp1xulxcrdiE_N6Wu3J_Ns0DEQViaW1c3xEdo8GtNnH0XXwY2a-f1XJAmX_MC4TwiX-qcQVQevJyxVbqWljhx)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa64198763b4691a0fb58821a90f834&_e=JQn4c35lxIuXz6ztEhz4LZ5wx4Kg7oQdPQGkReLvSN_dPY-lIHcwjWOOETctS0zBk9pF5-kgndzjbrlnpy4L6acp0eTUTBLmfmHQIbMrp8s2mVlDEuSUDOHdrgVFDS9qp5OKDcR-ire122eTvP2rg-KyOhN_4ZUQ7fBdxvgTQGEnd10Fy66ADiVm8sYC_GS-KccvAdZ4ehJtM8B0VB-c_i6v-xcFAK_CtXkfjTRNJ6Dj32YLxISC5kI1X7MRqjwVQo5Fqf4UlJ3Ldin4crkaLk-NeASfuh-7uNoBztwn3Xzr-laaQ7TY3mDUNMOBy489-bFM9JTpq6F4CRw1hL8mHuFeaEGUZvZjI3q1YFufafoTEBKIdmLUGXINOQDExoT_Lh1NOBhX8Xx2jcHfvGVDcmWHy-TfdOtmmucilTSTAFqdsdJmDUeteEUSPkRmw6UK).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=afa64198763b4691a0fb58821a90f834&_t=aDCoSzcpTUaeqNFcblsk7PTVwMjc-fpOcfhXbnu_WCIcefNhBmdYroGdqUhFQI-nww4OejoLoLYASm_8-NV0rFMNgNQNpEAi55OKLFz9imejItSvvhWfPYqIJelZN_Y7JcrUJUtidR_g8SV7eb7dl8omB138yfNoII9n8ZRLjIY%3D)

Retailers in California are backing a new ballot proposition that seeks to raise penalties for drug and property crimes amid a surge in such offenses. In 2014, California voters approved Proposition 47, a ballot measure that reclassified some non-violent offenses such as shoplifting and grand theft as misdemeanors instead of felonies, thereby reducing their penalties. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e39bf146024259a1d32c1b396222ca&_e=_SCain6o5GcTG5U9bPmiinbnoz57zoalJ764T7B86Ep9qc7gL3IHEaAtfDF-yH8FkeEJ1e-nEVMKtojEX6u2UfOOmlkBrJ26Q5nNlb-p0ZTEVitasbHPKWczOXaHuabx86KPaXFnEnWt26xs9Vv4vcgTzrSqFM9Z4AjJHhcwii6uqnmQtMRZvlSNL0zkUlIov4smj_mL5WBnLaII4fxigNdWH4egI9_O9nngVebN86uopDy-5hVtJqpp1oaRWWWibJBUVTDkg2YvEmd1D-drflE4CU47WejQZ-BtYyi3KAajCvaXKxvmda5Dw3YlGLX5y0957IN8KQbiW2ohywlAUuXCBfBT0ZHw50HXQcCyVtIUvUbfinEiktiM4cFEFw52A83GMCOUbbaUGUqrlBnTh3IN7id9wL9O09I0iQx-0D3bwg6TOU0-y5DuZyZ8SElA)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e39bf146024259a1d32c1b396222ca&_e=_SCain6o5GcTG5U9bPmiinbnoz57zoalJ764T7B86Ep9qc7gL3IHEaAtfDF-yH8FkeEJ1e-nEVMKtojEX6u2UfOOmlkBrJ26Q5nNlb-p0ZTEVitasbHPKWczOXaHuabx86KPaXFnEnWt26xs9Vv4vcgTzrSqFM9Z4AjJHhcwii6uqnmQtMRZvlSNL0zkUlIov4smj_mL5WBnLaII4fxigNdWH4egI9_O9nngVebN86uopDy-5hVtJqpp1oaRWWWibJBUVTDkg2YvEmd1D-drfkI3eHWZDbwGo51tI10eCDloOXswDt2HG7PD2x-dgT1Eg84IlqLIRPJKPIa85H3yUeef4ZxOGdpDifodiJLbFyZQNWPBKPJHtI5S5nob3EjBVDudqeyexIxKa2vFNwSUHkmuZbja5Z74rtXBHONCJqlthtJEMj69nvJYewFaODBZ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e39bf146024259a1d32c1b396222ca&_e=_SCain6o5GcTG5U9bPmiinbnoz57zoalJ764T7B86Ep9qc7gL3IHEaAtfDF-yH8FkeEJ1e-nEVMKtojEX6u2UfOOmlkBrJ26Q5nNlb-p0ZTEVitasbHPKWczOXaHuabx86KPaXFnEnWt26xs9Vv4vcgTzrSqFM9Z4AjJHhcwii6uqnmQtMRZvlSNL0zkUlIov4smj_mL5WBnLaII4fxigNdWH4egI9_O9nngVebN86uopDy-5hVtJqpp1oaRWWWibJBUVTDkg2YvEmd1D-drfh4eVjnp_BBr7GUxuMZN4Qoe4isAiPQmGpzg0UGq_l-hA3OJ8Rl_Lu2fVSQlrneMMR9HnIVef7Pmzs2Q_1SFHaa4pHjG6rzxUZCM2705Ml9KZOdOZjVEkiiNvilB8utTFLuc1WpWzb_-pXCjxNf48QL08HmgB5BU0ar1RZTE5LiQ)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61e39bf146024259a1d32c1b396222ca&_e=_SCain6o5GcTG5U9bPmiinbnoz57zoalJ764T7B86Ep9qc7gL3IHEaAtfDF-yH8FkeEJ1e-nEVMKtojEX6u2UfOOmlkBrJ26Q5nNlb-p0ZTEVitasbHPKWczOXaHuabx86KPaXFnEnWt26xs9Vv4vcgTzrSqFM9Z4AjJHhcwii6uqnmQtMRZvlSNL0zkUlIov4smj_mL5WBnLaII4fxigNdWH4egI9_O9nngVebN86uopDy-5hVtJqpp1oaRWWWibJBUVTDkg2YvEmd1D-drftX0-aPXuOjSjlO1nEG0JZgM2sGdxLo5Z480qCjA2yvdlUm9dBFTm-LQEl-veBf_4Gm8oqSR6Q5LPHffTIuJkOw-Ojttp5mD1ejRFk-2QRpQ2ipSP1kjqTcRkgrNQGJeOSxYrpImYSCdzzxbWOvja3k9NRTt4kXP_7VD7bQxlndg).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Merry Christmas

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Two very important things are happening tomorrow ...
1\. Christmas
As we celebrate our Savior's birth, my team and I want to say from the bottom of our hearts - thank you. Thank y'all for your continued support!
2\. We will be releasing an important video Christmas night at 7pm. A video made for you, for such a time as this.

Until then, Merry Christmas!
| | | _For Liberty,_

body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=550d408969ee43d8b4b63b794bddfacc&_e=3UF_VoVm-idXey-q5VG4LGnoc6B9haCOAOvdZmXoqAeXhE3Y9iGqXUkNiSwsy546jv4adgSZaZzA3Q8WhVh6GzliKk6bbJ0PP0xYp4hTA6LdZEDSghtRcO5D8uXoyWArPkfLcfSoThP40icK6qCPi2n9jVwnerkreYZoz39WClR1eyFKzncj_ohqid3ZfnZE_b4LBD2y6w8_SwtM_tEzz861Wo7gzy3fL1DRw72tFZLXxF2vzg4aLJPc07GzmoJs_9fD0pKdI81aD6qnZrbc5Frzra5pCbREI9bQ5a2uq9Ey1zjjrUkg68p6xQgu2exR) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=550d408969ee43d8b4b63b794bddfacc&_e=3UF_VoVm-idXey-q5VG4LGnoc6B9haCOAOvdZmXoqAeXhE3Y9iGqXUkNiSwsy546jv4adgSZaZzA3Q8WhVh6GzliKk6bbJ0PP0xYp4hTA6LdZEDSghtRcO5D8uXoyWArPkfLcfSoThP40icK6qCPi_aE01ICSDo9DssW6BoMOchutFqjVCFgnInLGwVueSbq-yQ9YEL9we0QKlqD9YB727IgzWxBdZ2jNR-P_t41p3By8cUW2TzVve-W67uIh6fLHzTfglR9ovis-WSpmtmos0xjYMVJBEswzqGMoaLyiKjpltJCxcfRBNG-0VERZqZv) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=550d408969ee43d8b4b63b794bddfacc&_e=3UF_VoVm-idXey-q5VG4LGnoc6B9haCOAOvdZmXoqAeXhE3Y9iGqXUkNiSwsy546jv4adgSZaZzA3Q8WhVh6GzliKk6bbJ0PP0xYp4hTA6LdZEDSghtRcO5D8uXoyWArPkfLcfSoThP40icK6qCPi1PfZM57WrP5abWIqbGh2L-BKK2FIauOfwRpPnBLmqyz2F2JI4TTnbq0tIrVQJnrisDxy2C3gBKrfzo3zeQldBRdPINfvsiURvE6A6bJdF1-UQU3H-ZXUxTIXP10eMKcItz_Ea-5BSvarHMKkWFB51ti7Uzti323iSN9sRik8PMP). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=550d408969ee43d8b4b63b794bddfacc&_e=3UF_VoVm-idXey-q5VG4LGnoc6B9haCOAOvdZmXoqAeXhE3Y9iGqXUkNiSwsy546jv4adgSZaZzA3Q8WhVh6GzliKk6bbJ0PP0xYp4hTA6LdZEDSghtRcO5D8uXoyWArPkfLcfSoThP40icK6qCPi9YosZv4FIGYMh8VYwUl3h-fp1_ER-y7HsB79teYzwm-I4ZDcvr2MsN0XnJTY5y5TnwnykND_5dRzn2jBaFZM8CxHJ4oxkSCcEUxzq4pgpT6bO4YK57SBYXvQH0-dRYFIvIDn7eVzq6ts6xy9JWWKKM7-YV9YsLDdasszL_mIs_J)

clean_body: Solar generators are a smart choice FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Rebekah Bydlak
subject: Why Catholic schools?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children.

| | | ****
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=286a5c79f64e4e109e130ef64816254b&_e=jHW9E07hPYbjSwnYnXv2AlOzMi_860DsEl_JXDE9pLX4WANrZ_Qft9oNZKNOu_f3zCrPgI0kI40B2v01KWRuoMCV8aJrWxNjzfp8c0NAAfVnAHsH7h7aVM0cr6re0jJ-8XOEBGk3GoOnbRB4soHIEqzjySru1oJxJ1W3gWYY9aYShgnkhd4Wt_aD8TPJ3BYpDv8UIju-aOmO4m8SSrQ_bOQYpeVtuTX0M23vHGjfQRN_EDQ7Uey28DAlzMtlzK1SKMjFLWX2QJB7aXhKsYOTqQ%3D%3D)

| | Friend, Throughout the United States, Catholic schools are __**_instrumental_** in reigniting students' and communities' passion for learning. Whether it's the strong academic foundation offered by urban Catholic schools or the fundamental education accessible through new classical Catholic schools, Catholic education holds a profound intellectual and spiritual legacy for students and their families.
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children. **[Sadly, financial challenges are leading many Catholic schools to close their doors, leaving families with limited alternatives.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=286a5c79f64e4e109e130ef64816254b&_e=jHW9E07hPYbjSwnYnXv2AlOzMi_860DsEl_JXDE9pLX4WANrZ_Qft9oNZKNOu_f3zCrPgI0kI40B2v01KWRuoMCV8aJrWxNjzfp8c0NAAfVnAHsH7h7aVM0cr6re0jJ-0Be5szgQS6VMCW5C9Si8VfZWe-a8mDoRw4xB3cwkte9BM2xeThea04QXYYplSG94dbTmNq65OpVFkblFKLqP3VlMoGZTYqlmz332CG1lWbzH-o8d-Gno_cqJYp5vQVbmNBMP4MH_9Bo1wHxaz27jYQ%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=286a5c79f64e4e109e130ef64816254b&_e=jHW9E07hPYbjSwnYnXv2AlOzMi_860DsEl_JXDE9pLX4WANrZ_Qft9oNZKNOu_f3zCrPgI0kI40B2v01KWRuoMCV8aJrWxNjzfp8c0NAAfVnAHsH7h7aVM0cr6re0jJ-lfmdd-reGsFVMDlKXrm5UJCaXTSHMwUm_NLaoqziNxfxB38JO_HwL5XSkNWkChvy9xhhcDiPVnWfBGLZMFizk8wq_WBEP_FwWFtk__w1lEmGOZ_x4XpiRKmGa43qInoq-W7NpCe6l03pTIIhTWPYDQ%3D%3D)
---
As the school choice movement expands, this story will no longer need to be told. Instead, we can embrace a story of resurgence, with schools reopening and growing to provide a quality education to families of all income levels. **[If you believe families should have access to Catholic education through the school choice movement, please add your name today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=286a5c79f64e4e109e130ef64816254b&_e=jHW9E07hPYbjSwnYnXv2AlOzMi_860DsEl_JXDE9pLX4WANrZ_Qft9oNZKNOu_f3zCrPgI0kI40B2v01KWRuoMCV8aJrWxNjzfp8c0NAAfVnAHsH7h7aVM0cr6re0jJ-1iN6evuBj8cF88Z2ELae6GhW-E5f6BPTb2DfqQjrfXaGWLCO2EyoGqvTTrvc09MJe5r1zfnrkQinbwyltkdD5EYrq1tNpY6O4_PjREvu7csIpNj5uV-NzccizfiohobT-kO18epzLyp8KW_RNx_03Q%3D%3D)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=856e70901ded43afb824542f86899feb&_e=Q_ec6kAeQOSCgXckGp4H2Jv9exAKOYEa0jGj-fTeOx7OqSAHZmPdjJF1MaWj2sPaoTVcixLmoESW2WZYDhwLz5Sn-thaz32-bsTmwY6rdWWyppby3nRrYL0a0XvKm_q-aM6Ty4e6-hjEWfjb7vAd7vbxrRQnso1LoRbn6GFT31gjVgW9Z-fMz7TuhzfR1tt1xsndD0rakcF7hex0ebKjqkHXrjAg8MgKra3lU84_ThWpiUPxH0tig0U6sSsai608DaK3Vy5Xa31gOoZ1Gd8_fUV3SPZAGUfNwCC8lKPvNrkcJSqq33nEA9a48OydLheCs_pw1aXYabHM7D_PoWT6hpgdbdcdV4uyWIbu3AmgH5_eBbO9-BqRut9FJyDMIn1yIZFTdF1AiSbSWmswU6ia4-YjlEQCrumE9LCZCLJsOA4%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=856e70901ded43afb824542f86899feb&_e=Q_ec6kAeQOSCgXckGp4H2Jv9exAKOYEa0jGj-fTeOx7OqSAHZmPdjJF1MaWj2sPaoTVcixLmoESW2WZYDhwLz5Sn-thaz32-bsTmwY6rdWWyppby3nRrYL0a0XvKm_q-aM6Ty4e6-hjEWfjb7vAd7vbxrRQnso1LoRbn6GFT31gjVgW9Z-fMz7TuhzfR1tt1xsndD0rakcF7hex0ebKjqkHXrjAg8MgKra3lU84_ThWpiUPxH0tig0U6sSsai608DaK3Vy5Xa31gOoZ1Gd8_fb8lZV0PvhWML4kJKSBvVHSAYsOjAfQ9DzHeRJq-_1f4cFtWYf1iC61QMpImxme_HFGhBMq7i5YMxJaBrtW99DYqbSRTunemGoSooWEVjF2FcMbwFIoXuU6-pw8Hzdqj2n5-KWAyPpT5lOy_lWbebLo%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=856e70901ded43afb824542f86899feb&_e=Q_ec6kAeQOSCgXckGp4H2Jv9exAKOYEa0jGj-fTeOx7OqSAHZmPdjJF1MaWj2sPaoTVcixLmoESW2WZYDhwLz5Sn-thaz32-bsTmwY6rdWWyppby3nRrYL0a0XvKm_q-aM6Ty4e6-hjEWfjb7vAd7vbxrRQnso1LoRbn6GFT31gjVgW9Z-fMz7TuhzfR1tt1xsndD0rakcF7hex0ebKjqkHXrjAg8MgKra3lU84_ThWpiUPxH0tig0U6sSsai608DaK3Vy5Xa31gOoZ1Gd8_fZ56sH7sV_yNi082LgC-69Fjj0eCBijquuOfhfnRO7HkvIQKlum3CEymYwfyuHLOXSI9ZCTuX3R7driqhT8HojpfmhRQNhnruspKCowwtDqIKD7zsXErYihGLoavykV3579jbRTUnR3dDHrYIx3r-NU%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=856e70901ded43afb824542f86899feb&_e=Q_ec6kAeQOSCgXckGp4H2Jv9exAKOYEa0jGj-fTeOx7OqSAHZmPdjJF1MaWj2sPaoTVcixLmoESW2WZYDhwLz5Sn-thaz32-bsTmwY6rdWWyppby3nRrYL0a0XvKm_q-aM6Ty4e6-hjEWfjb7vAd7vbxrRQnso1LoRbn6GFT31gjVgW9Z-fMz7TuhzfR1tt1xsndD0rakcF7hex0ebKjqkHXrjAg8MgKra3lU84_ThWpiUPxH0tig0U6sSsai608DaK3Vy5Xa31gOoZ1Gd8_fSR3sYSGfmgbPcOnYepO5ZXYupMfUPjAZwFmfpzjYl13KBG48i81t72FHAngFVqqFi1-GAHeDeEvFb-rQv_6qY7DXlFXNMKyLVwlyVf66quEAxggqIP3N54MdDE8VZOPGnV3RPi2RtAJcuPEz5vB8I0%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsQGJAlioN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osQGJAlioN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by

clean_body: Dear Friend, Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism. But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism? This is precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e840f9e41344e1a94c2e3efeea047c9&_e=I1gLe3FRumSCj9UIQOYzaAf0ECL4qYE2sgB0Tw-InFxRZBfMj3KR8oOQ5hQ9ZknbGvIRrAnBbSi2QCRO37W_ahdJEaPaU_qJKU2VDDapfreA7qqJ5Bq429OxkgF9Rp0ORFgbPOyTCmGQK1UlKX2_En9LOalXOXdbx4kIvYFAJVsVZOuDkYxk-tpUNAvZnV8QrHQGzGinkyFB31-3M4nxObPIX9ZOazbqwTys7KCGGOaCnLLL85kzRcspjk44S3Fqm8C8my2ZLUwymq9DtMYlmE1e6GMGoRl7sHaSqRo7jV31BNIW78mNl3xVWvJ3j8_BBOvtQyWYojmmthS-NHwbPr0bfW-Jq9jBqWv9o4VRf2UbOfDcnGTGAgXhQfJVXGxSlhdMKysCk6B25xj6Tv8trUTUwp0GQLcCk_j0ry813m4%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e840f9e41344e1a94c2e3efeea047c9&_e=I1gLe3FRumSCj9UIQOYzaAf0ECL4qYE2sgB0Tw-InFxRZBfMj3KR8oOQ5hQ9ZknbGvIRrAnBbSi2QCRO37W_ahdJEaPaU_qJKU2VDDapfreA7qqJ5Bq429OxkgF9Rp0ORFgbPOyTCmGQK1UlKX2_En9LOalXOXdbx4kIvYFAJVsVZOuDkYxk-tpUNAvZnV8QrHQGzGinkyFB31-3M4nxObPIX9ZOazbqwTys7KCGGOaCnLLL85kzRcspjk44S3Fqm8C8my2ZLUwymq9DtMYlmFHXpl7G_Jg23se0qRnx5zn1jRiaXHjqK04_-PkN9kWHWrYMDkllQxoCq1sB66D1NGjvjsbLIjF7hhFMlowHQoVNY6aojwFI5l5kp0442V5v5Q26owg4gg2tNyp4snE_G0WvnfjkKO9l67bLdV28vJc%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e840f9e41344e1a94c2e3efeea047c9&_e=I1gLe3FRumSCj9UIQOYzaAf0ECL4qYE2sgB0Tw-InFxRZBfMj3KR8oOQ5hQ9ZknbGvIRrAnBbSi2QCRO37W_ahdJEaPaU_qJKU2VDDapfreA7qqJ5Bq429OxkgF9Rp0ORFgbPOyTCmGQK1UlKX2_En9LOalXOXdbx4kIvYFAJVsVZOuDkYxk-tpUNAvZnV8QrHQGzGinkyFB31-3M4nxObPIX9ZOazbqwTys7KCGGOaCnLLL85kzRcspjk44S3Fqm8C8my2ZLUwymq9DtMYlmBzZeRh2k6G-6tNRtqaJevwmbVuvIYy7HwThujU1x6GlE7VEDnIuKMfmCQXOyOnOOB1Tos-xSPpKkEpn9KWi8Cgb_-rBYLkznIiUawUPocKC0Q5w35jULPpyieZMqhLPNhsJkwVNNjaTMgn1T9YaRGI%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e840f9e41344e1a94c2e3efeea047c9&_e=I1gLe3FRumSCj9UIQOYzaAf0ECL4qYE2sgB0Tw-InFxRZBfMj3KR8oOQ5hQ9ZknbGvIRrAnBbSi2QCRO37W_ahdJEaPaU_qJKU2VDDapfreA7qqJ5Bq429OxkgF9Rp0ORFgbPOyTCmGQK1UlKX2_En9LOalXOXdbx4kIvYFAJVsVZOuDkYxk-tpUNAvZnV8QrHQGzGinkyFB31-3M4nxObPIX9ZOazbqwTys7KCGGOaCnLLL85kzRcspjk44S3Fqm8C8my2ZLUwymq9DtMYlmPibHYqdNOyEDeiS56-zrGKIy_-Ynw73dxr5sTK1djWw2qYkTIwhePIklCidj_arLGLGewDMkURjRu2LXkaqoNo6azvexdaZs66rgOgd7UvZJYzADbkbTNrdzKp6NXHZaqdte-FJzLmGZM9oP7fwae4%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Unveil the extraordinary leaders of military history in this free eBook
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483b82b9d7684c9d80b0bd2f2a9cd818&_e=e2VESi_NxoxpKNaC4rmVaCVIWICKQBk5xSv2Hj3F2DVQCbChADKE_9o7awUbkInj5xhCwAlBv2KDV1eOXky2htUbILGl1C8uEkjq7wQUOPFrCvrAP65n32rAFwPqO9RcmuvCtysJ7qtSZVq5sACkIYNuwfLzV1ZkAlG6mRJdb1qlNpQmp7LMaHqnBn1RBTPEYeTPfpocXprf_nEDDdnxhn25kEYhzMivHOhte_5oJ4SOwWNi6siB5KY_VNd1oqmEMnkLElBSRYo8gxsRxWKT_Nsq-ZY4KhbTitJXl3TSNIJ9LaG4tVV-CoqwNQSVHz_Y4ryNVeVdpxwL9bL3M2pMsV5L4EefUPSeelvOi9aJyT-ncYcSq7FkCjyTu-jjGPAeImHeyKr4jvEo_dcMu_lzVA%3D%3D)

---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483b82b9d7684c9d80b0bd2f2a9cd818&_e=e2VESi_NxoxpKNaC4rmVaCVIWICKQBk5xSv2Hj3F2DVQCbChADKE_9o7awUbkInj5xhCwAlBv2KDV1eOXky2htUbILGl1C8uEkjq7wQUOPFrCvrAP65n32rAFwPqO9RcmuvCtysJ7qtSZVq5sACkIYNuwfLzV1ZkAlG6mRJdb1qlNpQmp7LMaHqnBn1RBTPEYeTPfpocXprf_nEDDdnxhn25kEYhzMivHOhte_5oJ4R2HzUkOVnSydEDkfdSpJD7mgeLLQ17cgoqC3GkriMmV4EsThLIaZIqyxclzMASJKnDKCopdMiqh31UzKGyGbeZSagY2xF7boXg4GVQFWmQml2pg41oZUTtg2fkfJ02FdBfy54oLyC67kSWPb_zjxaC0nsDxmHC3Pdv42wHy6ukVA%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483b82b9d7684c9d80b0bd2f2a9cd818&_e=e2VESi_NxoxpKNaC4rmVaCVIWICKQBk5xSv2Hj3F2DVQCbChADKE_9o7awUbkInj5xhCwAlBv2KDV1eOXky2htUbILGl1C8uEkjq7wQUOPFrCvrAP65n32rAFwPqO9RcmuvCtysJ7qtSZVq5sACkIYNuwfLzV1ZkAlG6mRJdb1qlNpQmp7LMaHqnBn1RBTPEYeTPfpocXprf_nEDDdnxhn25kEYhzMivHOhte_5oJ4QHJi7fddC3Av27OmRzLC9cEJLUQFtPMMUQejgwzawygSqB3Rm3kj2vMSdkVrYPguEAb9U8T13sXYhhM63qZ_nrY6ydyS63w5vutdZgc3PBtg3b-_pPUVashvwThwP3lg2YmkR9hdWiC29JW07JqpwVvaqvxRN8fXwEuurrj4yKWw%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483b82b9d7684c9d80b0bd2f2a9cd818&_e=e2VESi_NxoxpKNaC4rmVaCVIWICKQBk5xSv2Hj3F2DVQCbChADKE_9o7awUbkInj5xhCwAlBv2KDV1eOXky2htUbILGl1C8uEkjq7wQUOPFrCvrAP65n32rAFwPqO9RcmuvCtysJ7qtSZVq5sACkIYNuwfLzV1ZkAlG6mRJdb1qlNpQmp7LMaHqnBn1RBTPEYeTPfpocXprf_nEDDdnxhn25kEYhzMivHOhte_5oJ4Rt1Chri-MNVNuF4TF6zxoOLzY9_x3RN6flOBfx7tjcPUcIfFSgSp9js4T13OjZ1Ucl3yPcDVS2OuQjYks6kV0S9Xj9nAYDMEhtlpW3nc21aKe3goK594Cc-UNvPfJ634LFjqzVZC5eLvjbkAxD3SBhw5Jo3MIgIacgKoLKFA129Q%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754c8dba454646639c659c5562122106&_e=1HUgfDQn7ZTqNN_4IeLZ1NNujzvW-HNlHjfUUmTHU__Nxr2TwTGSopb_MDvMPPDb1dXjNOBijOvsZZYc6qAOcymRho7U2OA_BuP8wvB-2XoklS6kDTeP0E2XuOdo_GXBSrZ2qCy9s2SQrlf6nwwoDQ-4d94sIf11XzKdDifaVtVS64vx7kBOEUlPcwSXSsaKa9Sn68ReXOFymIpIpVykgW8HhD_sera6DmMuc1jyLrnm7CiI_xl2et_jwrbHSlxCTnJgBSgHrRfQy9_gmz3vJJh0ictonmtsDGo5ywNGLKUnrT4STGsYuiPhPOwIm-mTNyMi3m5FWj2uZj-ohm3Cp0wgAcrrbs7QFdgQ3W0NWqtYXrVSZ33Byd4kATpZYJTUgLHF2BNTbPYYJ5vz0tn_x_23sPb5-C0TmCGezrXt1C8SKAK0eQ1NnFZCUZC4n8pY)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754c8dba454646639c659c5562122106&_e=1HUgfDQn7ZTqNN_4IeLZ1NNujzvW-HNlHjfUUmTHU__Nxr2TwTGSopb_MDvMPPDb1dXjNOBijOvsZZYc6qAOcymRho7U2OA_BuP8wvB-2XoklS6kDTeP0E2XuOdo_GXBSrZ2qCy9s2SQrlf6nwwoDQ-4d94sIf11XzKdDifaVtVS64vx7kBOEUlPcwSXSsaKa9Sn68ReXOFymIpIpVykgW8HhD_sera6DmMuc1jyLrnm7CiI_xl2et_jwrbHSlxCTnJgBSgHrRfQy9_gmz3vJCxCwL7WASFusb58MSlsidm_XOtio132iNzowAmk2I0llwURZb9NU_5ygNZkmpxaO8GWKdfXG-tkAEXtQhQI9SXQRRWEAnAEqGrS0eutFtSKk8X808PYXY7MfI1CHtr3I8x3UZHtNSSBDcZ5mw4NdJf3UAL5aFzWHaSmJhwDeuOs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754c8dba454646639c659c5562122106&_e=1HUgfDQn7ZTqNN_4IeLZ1NNujzvW-HNlHjfUUmTHU__Nxr2TwTGSopb_MDvMPPDb1dXjNOBijOvsZZYc6qAOcymRho7U2OA_BuP8wvB-2XoklS6kDTeP0E2XuOdo_GXBSrZ2qCy9s2SQrlf6nwwoDQ-4d94sIf11XzKdDifaVtVS64vx7kBOEUlPcwSXSsaKa9Sn68ReXOFymIpIpVykgW8HhD_sera6DmMuc1jyLrnm7CiI_xl2et_jwrbHSlxCTnJgBSgHrRfQy9_gmz3vJLfSofrjCczk2dGOckfD9j8AcTagu45ZRl3tBGKiMUi-AA9w74tIDGBhQnvEDIsbDOYz-N6WVILQpgKGgsYrlx_fpQ3Z7kntHc3a9-7hDjJnX5PRgkn5sDLUwaOO2r2Y9IOd43pk4yeHf1TdlOvTPJiTg7vMTAYaRjvgDpopP06S)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=754c8dba454646639c659c5562122106&_e=1HUgfDQn7ZTqNN_4IeLZ1NNujzvW-HNlHjfUUmTHU__Nxr2TwTGSopb_MDvMPPDb1dXjNOBijOvsZZYc6qAOcymRho7U2OA_BuP8wvB-2XoklS6kDTeP0E2XuOdo_GXBSrZ2qCy9s2SQrlf6nwwoDQ-4d94sIf11XzKdDifaVtVS64vx7kBOEUlPcwSXSsaKa9Sn68ReXOFymIpIpVykgW8HhD_sera6DmMuc1jyLrnm7CiI_xl2et_jwrbHSlxCTnJgBSgHrRfQy9_gmz3vJIaclQR4G3tGtjhSMfn0wW44wDFyzrxxo5EQ8rrmTODdbfNsNy4ynF200qAXjqCzFmiSswhOwbQCCb5iVkrJrLQWSyvfIQfd2wprVubvQeo6Bb-JOc-oIGYzpQdhTsKb5IcIU8uvgLXXZHKQg-qiXZt_C83INm8sdaVvPk6TX2FT).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c17b78fe4bd449ab6833423bcd733f3&_e=scOPLUy8EmaVANShrIhgpHUbB9ZR59w_njyOAykmMU_g_jih9WcRdvZTe09PZm-raJigrL0DRqY2PPrUT2Y6lyA3f3-hwpfdd1TLyDwOTMr5lHK1gTyhyS7y9Nzdm1x1t0NJrxtoF_y-I8mU0n44_5nJcRfKcwpI1GVGDvNjhqb9pco3ty7uFoBi8oagemeFa_pTv9c2bqRqK3UaQHR_JoeGZ2YN5ZMe-5KRyslHXiZjG1myl14nNyp2E0EBKgxNXqXHXrfP8KtSZFUHVIWWQQcQiLxHSgUGA_J_CR-qFlsthT8ZQNbUYhY80_21eX-HMKatLT3yUWg_6wcxNwZxXgHyqWgXtGY2SwOvKEAZadFAFOD7ubqf0qvotPwRez7cEURZZOCWwBOQvRaf4t162sXXp8rw_T4HI1aDNBx5fdGSBhMGfCxDxyhpeEPzfnfX)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c17b78fe4bd449ab6833423bcd733f3&_e=scOPLUy8EmaVANShrIhgpHUbB9ZR59w_njyOAykmMU_g_jih9WcRdvZTe09PZm-raJigrL0DRqY2PPrUT2Y6lyA3f3-hwpfdd1TLyDwOTMr5lHK1gTyhyS7y9Nzdm1x1t0NJrxtoF_y-I8mU0n44_5nJcRfKcwpI1GVGDvNjhqb9pco3ty7uFoBi8oagemeFa_pTv9c2bqRqK3UaQHR_JoeGZ2YN5ZMe-5KRyslHXiZjG1myl14nNyp2E0EBKgxNXqXHXrfP8KtSZFUHVIWWQYwtQoAmQuktcNDhlganqmB348Sb7I2DwmT9EPVNhLGl5PAhG_CzFTHrewBvnrTdM-iW_Dc1iyfWSi1q-rUtA1OkMcu40kDeAOhfDDi5yum9eF-Q1x5rMhpr9131aQQgPxF5JYLU6tT1_LF3D9HyAH8-ez1w6rUOz9v9UujAn12T)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c17b78fe4bd449ab6833423bcd733f3&_e=scOPLUy8EmaVANShrIhgpHUbB9ZR59w_njyOAykmMU_g_jih9WcRdvZTe09PZm-raJigrL0DRqY2PPrUT2Y6lyA3f3-hwpfdd1TLyDwOTMr5lHK1gTyhyS7y9Nzdm1x1t0NJrxtoF_y-I8mU0n44_5nJcRfKcwpI1GVGDvNjhqb9pco3ty7uFoBi8oagemeFa_pTv9c2bqRqK3UaQHR_JoeGZ2YN5ZMe-5KRyslHXiZjG1myl14nNyp2E0EBKgxNXqXHXrfP8KtSZFUHVIWWQTckfU30NOVJR9SDxa200rqKeu34r5XU9R1W1Q6Uc6_r2k4wdtbImX_sPsBiFfoXvwj9xC0rP5qKaXR65L2fNoQm9Sqwe5lGm3n_WgIVHsdqLIz0VIrJhDTGYPhpGdNZnbqk83D7ThpuyTaWxxEoszMvd2O79nTGUpCBlwAO9XH9)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c17b78fe4bd449ab6833423bcd733f3&_e=scOPLUy8EmaVANShrIhgpHUbB9ZR59w_njyOAykmMU_g_jih9WcRdvZTe09PZm-raJigrL0DRqY2PPrUT2Y6lyA3f3-hwpfdd1TLyDwOTMr5lHK1gTyhyS7y9Nzdm1x1t0NJrxtoF_y-I8mU0n44_5nJcRfKcwpI1GVGDvNjhqb9pco3ty7uFoBi8oagemeFa_pTv9c2bqRqK3UaQHR_JoeGZ2YN5ZMe-5KRyslHXiZjG1myl14nNyp2E0EBKgxNXqXHXrfP8KtSZFUHVIWWQZSglMMrbEOhFKE-N0hTnooeYDS1_0gVwb84zYcdB_aRNimtakGyKoUF2SqlSIL1lbv6NEXOzhY1fl2x3A9HdgWYrXWPm2x0Dp1qBdgcHGX_cXijGlKNZN9AjntX0O0qecvBCMdqQFZcSL-EpPDhbXduT1Ygs7d5LVbERNAKWoI_).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: Re: bucking the trend

body:
Over the last couple of years, Catholic schools saw a sharp decline in enrollment, the largest in 50 years!

| | |
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13724670befb4cdf8e156a4cb7c475b2&_e=KyQ0ik5qizEGgJflbsgYSAwpLwoj6iMZFgWejNnOlnbY81y51Q73CFxVLep5vKjCfLG-DEOuXPwbhtnz7JJXB7EJJvakiqcpUO49z7oovlHxrparj6wvPd_opmzoVA09WM6TBHziItbrBz-tXC2ck9T3-XRPxKt9xXo9n6czKqb0Uh2XKCB_8fp83EAH0T0UpGTfBJmHNbXFguDM-3wC5UjShhSEwOHBS-I_wqPHzKPQKKGYC04nQIovJsSD67_JQpqkurc65gWNegOg19SFoQ%3D%3D)

| | Hey Friend, it's Rebekah with the American Federation for Children. Over the last couple of years, Catholic schools saw a sharp decline in enrollment, **the largest in 50 years!** States that have school choice, however, are bucking the trend. ✅ Parents are in control of their children's education. ✅ Scholarship programs provide families with direct funding. ✅ Parents choose where they spend their scholarship dollars. _Friend, when states provide families with scholarships, kids have access to a Catholic education their parents otherwise wouldn 't be able to afford._ **[Will you sign our petition to support school choice and protect Catholic education?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13724670befb4cdf8e156a4cb7c475b2&_e=KyQ0ik5qizEGgJflbsgYSAwpLwoj6iMZFgWejNnOlnbY81y51Q73CFxVLep5vKjCfLG-DEOuXPwbhtnz7JJXB7EJJvakiqcpUO49z7oovlHxrparj6wvPd_opmzoVA09L_idvTCIUHiLfxAprRbs-vMeHnn5GyozD-NiWjGEY9jQ2x12M2yvE22_jmQFLmVXmvdYGPHiaciwnHzNYJxuoCmBMNP3bx-8U_tjxWp-DXkp1iB-x3I_Z8CmxM8K-rBnmZe3G4tIl6noIwMzfgFZWQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Over the last couple of years, Catholic schools saw a sharp decline in enrollment, the largest in 50 years! | | | | | Hey Friend, it's Rebekah with the American Federation for Children. Over the last couple of years, Catholic schools saw a sharp decline in enrollment, the largest in 50 years! States that have school choice, however, are bucking the trend. ✅ Parents are in control of their children's education. ✅ Scholarship programs provide families with direct funding. ✅ Parents choose where they spend their scholarship dollars. Friend, when states provide families with scholarships, kids have access to a Catholic education their parents otherwise wouldn 't be able to afford. We can't do this without your support, Friend.
