name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: The Left Suddenly Embraces Free Speech | U.S. Steel's Pending Sale to Overseas Company + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | |
### __Broad + Liberty's_ Weekly Reads:_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6070b819c8&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _**It all depends on what your definition of ‘context’ is.**_
---
| **Andy Bloom** wrote this week about the Left’s surprising and **sudden return to a love of free speech** , just in time for university leaders to excuse their students’ antisemitic harassment on campus. Misgendering or using the wrong pronouns is considered abuse or **hate speech** on some campuses, but calling for a genocide? Here Ivy league presidents say there’s room for nuance. [Read more at _Broad + Liberty_.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1f8c1d46ec&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### _Other Top Stories..._
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7461602b04&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
After an absurd _Inquirer_ op-ed claiming that entrepreneurs long for government regulation, **Greg Moreland** of the National Federation of Independent Business sets the record straight: [Small businesses don’t want Josh Shapiro’s illegal carbon tax](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d531b3e3eb&e=b7b3eddce2). Democrats' plans for **a tax on energy will make everything more expensive** , with the costs being passed on to workers and consumers.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=913320d112&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
As news broke of U.S. Steel’s pending sale to a Japanese company, politicians on both sides of the aisle rattled legislative sabers. Former state representative **Becky Corbin** looked at the problem and asked [whether the sale might not be good for Pennsylvania steel workers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=609cadd24c&e=b7b3eddce2), or at least better than the alternative. “This deal is about more than just preserving a legendary industry,” she writes, “it’s about positioning that industry for future success. **Rejecting it under the guise of protecting local interests** , while ignoring the dynamic and interconnected nature of modern global industries, would be a misguided decision.”
---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=684a3c69f0&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
From our friends at _National Review_ : Applications for the **Spring 2024 Burke to Buckley Programs** in Miami, New York, and Philadelphia are now open and the application deadline has been **EXTENDED** to _January 2nd_.

NRI’s in-person **Burke to Buckley Fellowship Program** currently operates in Chicago, Dallas, Miami, New York City, and Philadelphia. The program follows a [syllabus](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0218df075c&e=b7b3eddce2) that fosters a rigorous examination of conservative principles and how they apply to the issues of the day. For each session of the eight seminars, participants complete a reading assignment that they then discuss over dinner with a leading conservative thinker. The classes are composed of approximately 20 mid-career professionals (between 10 and 25 years of professional work experience). This program is not intended for recent graduates or people working in the fields of public policy or politics. Participants and alumni receive invitations to exclusive networking happy hours and other annual and regional events when they occur. They also receive a complimentary ticket to the Buckley Prize Dinner in the year that they participate in the program.

_For information on the NRI Burke to Buckley Dinner-Discussion Series and to apply go[here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7bdfd165eb&e=b7b3eddce2)._

|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| **Former Congressman Peter Meijer** — one of the few Republicans in the chamber to vote for the impeachment of President Donald Trump — wrote this week for _The Free Press_ that the Colorado Supreme Court’s attempt to exclude Trump from the ballot in 2024 was [a shameful attack on American democracy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4ef03a0916&e=b7b3eddce2). If Democrats want to defeat Trump, they should do so by nominating a candidate who can actually beat him fair and square.
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. This holiday season, please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject matter, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you, and we wish you and your family a wonderful Christmas filled with love and joy.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---
|
---

---

If we’re going to take this win home though, we need to end 2023 with a bang! That means digging deeper than we ever have, in order to win. **We****’re in the FINAL WEEK of 2023, and our team wants to start the election year as strong as possible.** **[Will you pitch in now to send Hung Cao to the U.S. Senate and build a winning movement?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=2bc2566e29e8458b85e0d279ca1d5d85&_e=bJ2naY_k4HJaemTBsC7hbsZTeIneX_EPS5KkKQTTNwoKL2XuMIdd-_9u6yIjqpVE9zw4_imkUL86fc8p2HclVJyYNVUaLCpeGNNftIq5zd3BIL6yXGebXnfijIWtalEHWW7lvZHtkFtahwhH8ovIGpBm_AFOznFfPElEltigEa8M39SYdMmZP2FhiIULGYlNAC3KdiDiZ1OVAJkVspjjyZqxWm_rO5f2Nc0ot-3DEeasEElry1exGgRg-HHLIc0S5gecHDXWe9TFEFncNTNfSgFV5FStxab-xe4GK8UeETnGaKLt21K9oahWnw-zCuuJyfNSj9SnNbUwPxFLJh0NoDFxdl_BfBs9hvcwP2sZo8i_GiI9wl96WmrX9qzAzP22)**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, 2023 has been an incredible year for us. We built an incredible movement, and patriots from across Virginia have stepped up to FIRE Tim Kaine and bring real leadership to Virginia. If we’re going to take this win home though, we need to end 2023 with a bang! That means digging deeper than we ever have, in order to win. We’re in the FINAL WEEK of 2023, and our team wants to start the election year as strong as possible. The more Virginias we meet, the more we’re hearing the same thing: our commonwealth is sick and tired of career politicians. They’re ready for patriots that put our country before their own personal gain. Hung hasn’t spent his life in politics, Peter. He’s spent it fighting for our country as a U.S. Navy Captain. And his fight for America is far from over. - As we reflect on 2023, we can’t help but be filled with gratitude for all you’ve done for our movement so far. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Your Christmas message from Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ac787694235167f3eb943ac6dc932ac62bcb8e956c14a787066c1f80ad98fdd4fe381e438374b77493c133b8882aacc2674c3d0438c114a10f2aa82fdd4027e2d01f45860ad88a130a27ba15862c4dee

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee5eace83e906256e7b79849eaedf5f6326f7cf3cfbb6bd4877ac377139324942736796b3fa1e67b6d2f7aa61160d49f6c769094539f3f3baa

Merry Christmas Eve, Friend! Ron DeSantis has a special holiday message he asked us to share with you:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee5eace83e906256e7b79849eaedf5f6326f7cf3cfbb6bd4877ac377139324942736796b3fa1e67b6d2f7aa61160d49f6c769094539f3f3baa

>From all of us here on Team DeSantis, we hope you're spending time with your loved ones and enjoying some downtime before we head into the new year. We have been so blessed to have you on our side since you decided to join our team.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee5eace83e906256e7b79849eaedf5f6326f7cf3cfbb6bd4877ac377139324942736796b3fa1e67b6d2f7aa61160d49f6c769094539f3f3baa
Don't forget to catch Ron DeSantis' Christmas message for you!

Thank you for supporting our mission through every season.

God bless,

Your Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee5eace83e906256e7b79849eaedf5f6326f7cf3cfbb6bd4877ac377139324942736796b3fa1e67b6d2f7aa61160d49f6c769094539f3f3baa

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee81d763edf5cff2da33d6d33021f9b6500f9a2b24bf242038ac0b3ed7b9507241a89a46b099a80e057e80af1ec2c6fa489aec479732762b04
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee5eace83e906256e7b79849eaedf5f6326f7cf3cfbb6bd4877ac377139324942736796b3fa1e67b6d2f7aa61160d49f6c769094539f3f3baa

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8975022cdf5568ee5eace83e906256e7b79849eaedf5f6326f7cf3cfbb6bd4877ac377139324942736796b3fa1e67b6d2f7aa61160d49f6c769094539f3f3baa

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: To: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58690?t=6&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58690?t=7&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58690?t=8&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58690?t=9&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58690?t=10&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12195%2E878179%2EjYx3-B)
---

Hey there Fellow American, it's Pat Harrigan.
---
As a former Green Beret, I know better than most that no great mission is achieved without teamwork. Without my fellow soldiers by my side, I probably wouldn’t be here today. Out in the field, we work together to take down the enemy and keep each other safe. Now that I’m running for Congress, I’ve learned that the ropes here aren’t that different. We have a real shot at winning and bringing real, service-first representation to Congress, but only if we work together. **[Will you join my A-Team today so we can fight for our freedom through Election Day 2024?](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=85774847aca3452d994cb9d021278b56&_e=robuscs0zU_j262cNw0-Sl1pYreC--XWaXgARqBZNziXnHdStPAIRThiYRK4vqHTStP-PV7TJf0VvfpAGevV9DtpOurarQB0jWj6b3Ca-Baj2kv7qGbuVQHppj7-mfMq4KB6UDwiYkzR2JzBCi8SsSODeZoYlQQMWow7_7_cnhfIQJflEG1oNs-q1U_r5S4-Th1PRG9cWjlyyeiL7M8f_LqhxLkq6vDhxqQWkV7tn1fUCEn9ZieUF1RQW7RXzM5PB_fc_n_MEW_5JQDMO0w28PzmDz1oFDtfKhFIWlZMFYgAMg5aif1PNdZ17KEwKC1zOWc_2-JlD882lY8PWv3WoF3QaSX0PBr0Iym_4eHNP1m2TxSyPco2HPEVwUr_SPNo)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW **](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=85774847aca3452d994cb9d021278b56&_e=robuscs0zU_j262cNw0-Sl1pYreC--XWaXgARqBZNziXnHdStPAIRThiYRK4vqHTStP-PV7TJf0VvfpAGevV9DtpOurarQB0jWj6b3Ca-Baj2kv7qGbuVQHppj7-mfMq4KB6UDwiYkzR2JzBCi8SsSODeZoYlQQMWow7_7_cnhfIQJflEG1oNs-q1U_r5S4-Th1PRG9cWjlyyeiL7M8f_LqhxLkq6vDhxqQWkV7tn1fBjo7nbqCAkhLKWx7ZA-RmuhA5TXkMQl1xI7r-GjNS4vm5tJ1Ty5evFKIJMVVQ8_SQDbEfSJVnzV4PhswJaE0-0njwKcB9rUjS1wFB__CHXDVIzfphq7k1ZSdqgx4YQmPDkyc_IMAkIeR4E-f2A5bp)
---
I’m running for Congress to stop the Biden crime wave, secure our border, bring down inflation, and protect the American Dream that I’ve benefitted so much from for the next generation. It’s time to make America work for all of us, and that means building a majority in Congress made up of hardworking people who put our country before themselves. I’ve had it with politicians who sell out to the highest bidder. That’s not what I fought for in combat, and it’s not who I am. As your Congressman, I promise to ALWAYS put the American people first in everything I do, and I can’t wait to see all we can achieve together. **[Join our A-Team today and help us FIGHT for the American Dream!](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=85774847aca3452d994cb9d021278b56&_e=robuscs0zU_j262cNw0-Sl1pYreC--XWaXgARqBZNziXnHdStPAIRThiYRK4vqHTStP-PV7TJf0VvfpAGevV9DtpOurarQB0jWj6b3Ca-Baj2kv7qGbuVQHppj7-mfMq4KB6UDwiYkzR2JzBCi8SsSODeZoYlQQMWow7_7_cnhfIQJflEG1oNs-q1U_r5S4-Th1PRG9cWjlyyeiL7M8f_LqhxLkq6vDhxqQWkV7tn1eGQa27l9vBtL019MjPMee6V_6xcff_3k0kWySNAGmji5HQje8S5f-iVpLlUFvO7c2lj_pAjzgOUzwqcpl_LgulqQMu-4BikRT2x2WbWusrnXnG8skZZd8v6GqiBEsHeztlMqqLSlNbAseiLnqOa33J)**

name: Team Deluzio
subject: Happy Holidays, Derek!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Hi Derek,

From everyone here at Team Deluzio, we wanted to wish you a very happy holiday season! We are so grateful to have you on our team, fighting for a vision that we have all shared in this year.

Whether you are celebrating in Western PA or around the country, we hope that your holiday season is filled with warmth, health, laughter, and good food. Before you head offline for the holidays we have a quick favor to ask.

Can you chip in to support Team Deluzio this holiday season in the fight to protect the Common Good and take back the Democratic House majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=231224_team_happyholidays_l1]

Thank you for being a part of our team this year, and we can't wait to rest, recuperate, and rejoin the fight for the Common Good with you in 2024.

Cheers to a wonderful holiday season!

Team Deluzio
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.
Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue?

body:
| | | Fellow American,

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Holiday Wishes
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend,
I hope you are having a wonderful holiday season with family and friends. As the mother to a three year old daughter, I am enjoying the holiday by doing something I haven't done for a long time, seeing this time of year through a child's eyes.
No matter our age, we all have wishes that we would like to see fulfilled. My daughter, Rocio, has wishes that are simple, and in most cases easy to grant. While I don't think we'll be having candy for breakfast, I have to admit that ice cream for dinner sounds like a pretty great idea.
The wishes we have as parents for our children aren't as easy, but they are possible. We want our children to have more and better opportunities to build the life and career they want to as adults. We want them to grow up in a world with less discrimination where they are treated equally and fairly. We want our children to become adults in a world filled with peace, where the air is safe to breathe, the water is safe to drink, and one in which we have preserved the natural beauty that still inspires awe in us as adults.
While our children may not know it, the wishes that we have for them really are the wishes they have for themselves, and we can make those bigger wishes for our children come true.
This holiday season, Rocio and I both hope your wishes come true, and we hope that in the new year, we can all work together to make those big wishes, the ones we have for our children, and for all children, a reality.
Now, I have to get to the grocery store because we are definitely going to need more ice cream.
Happy Holidays!
Shamaine and Rocio
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

name: Brandon Presley
subject: Wishing you peace, joy, and many blessings!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
| Hi Peter — 2023 brought many blessings to me and my family. For one, I married the joy of my life, Katelyn, this August. She has traveled with me on the campaign trail, and I could always count on her to make me smile and give me strength in my moments of weakness. Every day her kindness inspires me to be a better partner, neighbor, and man of God. Another blessing I’m thankful for is the overwhelming number of you who welcomed us into your hearts and homes this year. Katelyn and I met so many wonderful families across our state on the campaign trail this year, and the fact that so many of you put your trust in me is a gift that I will never forget. Thank you. We hope this Christmas season brings you as much joy, peace, and blessings as you have brought us! Happy Holidays, Brandon Presley
---
| | Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
---
Brandon Presley Campaign
P.O. Box 208
Nettleton, MS 38858

name: David Hogg
subject: The second step for our generation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Let me tell you what I think, friend.
Young people are smart. We pay attention to the issues. We're showing up to vote.
But to me, this is only the first step for our generation. The second step?
We need young people on the ballot. We need young people in elected office.
That’s why I teamed up with Kevin Lata, the campaign manager who helped elect the first ever Gen-Z member of Congress last year, to launch Leaders We Deserve.
Friend, if you agree that we need more young, courageous leaders running for office, will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
As a generation, we grew up hearing that to survive a school shooting, we had to run, hide, and fight. I think our generation needs to reinterpret what that means.
*
We
need
to
run—for
office
.
Representation
won’t
happen
on
its
own.
*
We
need
to
stop
hiding
from
our
responsibility
to
our
country
and
planet.
*
We
need
to
fight
for
a
better
government
and
a
better
future
for
everyone.
That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists. We’re helping young people run for office and win—like Nadarius Clark, our endorsed candidate who just won in Virginia.
Leaders We Deserve was founded to recruit and support the next generation of leaders. Will you help us take the second step and split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thanks for everything you do for this movement,
David Hogg
Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Wishing you a Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DaHJpc3RtYXMtMjAyM18yMDIzMTIxOSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNocmlzdG1hcy0yMDIzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTUwIn0/BCbh8zsu-6ZV7QfdYFq-aA)

Fellow Conservative, I wanted to drop a quick note to wish you and your loved ones all the best. I hope you have big plans for a wonderful day of family time tomorrow.

Christians around the world celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. We reflect on his perfect love, and pray for all those hurting and in need around the world.

Merry Christmas, from my family to yours.

And thank you, as always, for standing with me to defend all we love and cherish.

\- Ted

P.S. Please consider making a special contribution today to fuel our fight when we kick off the New Year next week. _It’s a gift that will make a direct impact to Keep Texas Red and Save America next November!_ **[You can pitch in here >>>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DaHJpc3RtYXMtMjAyM18yMDIzMTIxOSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNocmlzdG1hcy0yMDIzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTUwIn0/p0EXIq3J_j-P6bUk0D3MpQ)**

clean_body: Everyone will be watching to see whether we have the resources we need to win this race -- or if we’re falling short. | | | This month, all eyes are on us. We'll explain what we mean in just a second, but first, we have to ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | In just seven days, we’ll close the books on December and publicly report how much our campaign has raised throughout the entire quarter. This is the last fundraising deadline of the year -- and the most important one yet. Everyone, from political pundits to the GOP establishment, will be watching to see whether we have the resources we need to win this race -- or if we’re falling short. And what we raise right now will determine the size and scope of the voter outreach, persuasion, and mobilization programs we’ll be able to run in 2024. That’s why hitting our end-of-quarter goal is critical. Listen, Peter -- you’re a key member of our team, and we couldn’t be more grateful. But we have a tough fight ahead, and the only way we can defend the White House -- and our very democracy -- is if you chip in at important moments like this. Thanks for everything you do, Biden-Harris Dems

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Take a break from scrolling and take our survey

body:

Hey Derek, we know many of you are enjoying some time with friends or family today, but if you’re just scrolling through your phone right now or have a few minutes, [**will you take our survey?**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20231224/?source=EMAO23_1_SUR_20231224_V1_F&akid=35307%2E3422442%2EgAW_lq)

Team KP

name: Diana
subject: re: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 22 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12990%2E9716520%2ExfUzyK)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12990%2E9716520%2ExfUzyK)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Dec 23, 2023
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania...
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12990%2E9716520%2ExfUzyK)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12990%2E9716520%2ExfUzyK)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewDecember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12990%2E9716520%2ExfUzyK)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12990%2E9716520%2ExfUzyK)
---

Thank you

\- James

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nO5K_k0lqADotsjDf4Vzkw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnawBaP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMjI0VwNzcGNCCmWDmFKIZa-ZwnxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/nO5K_k0lqADotsjDf4Vzkw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnawBaP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMjI0VwNzcGNCCmWDmFKIZa-ZwnxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | SURVEY: Who would you rather have at your Holiday Party? | Fellow Patriot, The holiday season is upon us – and I have to ask. Who would you rather have at your holiday party? Personally, I would choose the Grinch! His heart is DEFINITELY 3 sizes BIGGER than Sleepy Joe’s. But I want your opinion, Fellow Patriot. | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: Team Evergreen
subject: From all of us at Evergreen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE (D)
body:
Evergreen Action
evergreenaction.com
*********************

Get this, friend: Michigan residents pay some of the highest energy bills in the country. A Detroit Free Press story just broke that helps explain why. (We know it’s not for clean, reliable energy.)

DTE Energy, the state's largest power company, provides some of the dirtiest, least reliable energy in the country—and just bumped up its rates by 6.4 percent.

FUND OUR FIGHT AGAINST DIRTY UTILITIES >> [https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5092?t=1002&akid=13934%2E53494%2EN9_bzt

So where is all that ratepayer money going?

Instead of using ratepayer funds to benefit its customers, DTE charged its customers an eye-popping $5.3 million to pay for membership dues to shady groups like Edison Electric Institute (EEI) and fund fancy getaways to curry favor with local utility regulators.

This is the same EEI we told you about earlier this year—the one lobbying to block critical climate action. Tens of thousands of Evergreen action-takers like you stepped up to call for utility transparency and accountability. We got their attention, but the fight isn't over.

EEI is fighting back, and the current situation in Michigan proves there's still more work to be done. So, we're going to push even harder.

Next up: We're backing efforts in states across the country to make it illegal for utilities to charge customers for their dirty lobbying—and we need your help.

HELP US REACH OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL >> [https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5092?t=1003&akid=13934%2E53494%2EN9_bzt

Thank you for your support,

Courtney Bourgoin
Senior Policy and Advocacy Manager, Midwest
Evergreen Action

P.S. The fact is anti-climate lobbying is costing Michiganders millions of dollars each year. Even Republican Senator Ed McBroom called the whole scheme "a little obscene." With EEI's fossil fuel influence extending beyond the Great Lakes region, it's going to take all of us to demand utilities stand up for their customers, clean energy, and climate action. Chip in now >> [https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5100?t=1004&akid=13934%2E53494%2EN9_bzt
_________________________

Instead of using ratepayer funds to benefit its customers, DTE charged its customers an eye-popping $5.3 million to pay for membership dues to shady groups like Edison Electric Institute (EEI) and fund fancy getaways to curry favor with local utility regulators. This is the same EEI we told you about earlier this year—the one lobbying to block critical climate action. Tens of thousands of Evergreen action-takers like you stepped up to call for utility transparency and accountability. We got their attention, but the fight isn't over. EEI is fighting back, and the current situation in Michigan proves there's still more work to be done. So, we're going to push even harder. Next up: We're backing efforts in states across the country to make it illegal for utilities to charge customers for their dirty lobbying—and we need your help. HELP US REACH OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL >> [ Thank you for your support, Courtney Bourgoin Senior Policy and Advocacy Manager, Midwest Evergreen Action P.S. The fact is anti-climate lobbying is costing Michiganders millions of dollars each year. Even Republican Senator Ed McBroom called the whole scheme "a little obscene." With EEI's fossil fuel influence extending beyond the Great Lakes region, it's going to take all of us to demand utilities stand up for their customers, clean energy, and climate action. Chip in now >> [ Follow us on Twitter >> [ Follow us on Instagram >> [ Follow us on Facebook >> [ Follow us on LinkedIn >> [ This?t=1008 email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Sending you warmth, peace, and joy
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75741382/445625629/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk482-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgwMjk4MmQtNzZhMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jOr1Rq57uYa39praAHP7-cp-ufc2ztKWFixTu98t1xw=)
Hi there, friend, happy holidays! Before many of us log off to celebrate with our families, **I wanted to personally thank you for being a part of this grassroots movement.**
These last few months have been a whirlwind of events, rallies, meetings, interviews, and travel up and down Florida. Truthfully, it’s been a whirlwind at times. _But throughout it all, grassroots supporters like you have kept me going._
**Watching thousands of people rally behind our campaign has been the honor of a lifetime. **Your hope for Florida and our country inspires me. Your faith in me keeps me going. And your commitment to this campaign makes all of it possible.
More than ever before, I _know_ that Florida will flip blue in 2024. There's a palpable energy among voters and supporters like you. People here are sick and tired of the GOP's division and extremism. They want leaders who will bring our communities together, bridge the divides between us, and offer a hopeful, positive vision for the future.
**On Election Day, that's exactly what we're going to offer voters — and it will only have been possible because of your tireless support and your unwavering belief in a better future.** So, from the bottom of my heart, thank you.
As you celebrate the holidays and welcome the New Year, I hope that you and your loved ones are surrounded by warmth, peace, and joy.
With gratitude, love, and plenty of good cheer,

Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75741383/445625657/-31037693?refcode=jtk482-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgwMjk4MmQtNzZhMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jOr1Rq57uYa39praAHP7-cp-ufc2ztKWFixTu98t1xw=)
---

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Raising the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We did not spend years fighting this agenda under Trump only to give in to Republicans' extreme demands now.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20231224-3307-footer&t=1&akid=3307%2E420207%2EXABwXW)
Peter,
Senate Republicans have been pushing deeply restrictive and extreme immigration laws and they are critical aid for Ukraine hostage in exchange.
We cannot let this brinkmanship and chaos from MAGA Republicans stand any longer — it's time to raise the alarm in Congress. **We must reject this ransom demand for Ukraine aid and pass thoughtful, humane reforms.**
We must enact humane, bipartisan reforms to our broken immigration system. We need to expand lawful pathways and provide funding to cities welcoming new asylum seekers.
**We did not spend years fighting this agenda under Trump only to give in to Republicans' extreme demands now.**
[**If you stand with our movement, please add your name to amplify our call for Congress to reject the inhumane GOP immigration policy and prioritize human immigration reform.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/IR-em-20231224/?source=em20231224&t=2&akid=3307%2E420207%2EXABwXW)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/IR-em-20231224/?source=em20231224&t=3&akid=3307%2E420207%2EXABwXW)**

Pramila Jayapal

name: David Hogg
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=YV0e1rFO1PRk9qF8nf6i0jt16Nzgr6crpVtUbX63DQNzkiOZU%2BrJomrL8ivD1R1YbVvQi9%2BJaBtQH39jRy%2Bol%2FM%2Fvu4hzDy6yU%2BWiGwLprKK0LEvfXOYTB1Gws6LHC3Og4JzOZ0RW6uRuGWjlcgAEoFtUdKn5K%2BrT9JmEHgGbrPmx8RLuN6eMrhiJ2kxmT3T9NUQhH8tmrLtC0MbjmAUenNwbj%2FFPzVsEFMsMH3mxWyzadfR9UbuIrbW3fKe9Ome0rl%2FI75ZaaTMV0L%2FFv8ihFOmtpdlwowgzJo3U7gXk8K%2BDRXOD5YIGqP1iTI9ItV32La6mCDcLijxZ%2B3I%2BMMM4sddz7Tvs0uYTsVLFZZQ95GHxX0pws0q6kkr7pSUtejukWy6CUvftLr87q1BfAeGWSQOGcGoee1Y3MEvnMz8kPan6JIZu7Az34uSnjRnG5Ty .

Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, Peter.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Let’s do this,
David Hogg Co-founder,
Leaders We Deserve
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

clean_body: You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: . secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25] Hey, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. [] The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today? [] I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Roland Gutierrez today? [] Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Guess Who Missed the Nice List...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Time to ask Santa for a new President! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d64d1004b00a/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12670190?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=aa02cfcd25&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=e8b7396c1a&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| Peter,

As we head into another holiday season, there is only one thing that could spoil our Christmas cheer this year, **there’s a Grinch in the white house,_and his name is Joe Biden!!!_** But he didn’t stop there, this year he stole more than Christmas, he stole our prosperity, our values, and the very American dream!

There are numerous reasons Biden has made the naughty list this year; **_record high inflation, family corruption and bribery,_** and stealing not only presents but the _**individual freedoms of all Americans!**_ As we reflect on this past year with all of our family by our side, it is impossible to forget that while Joe and Hunter were working hard to make their family rich, and advancing the agenda of the Left in 2024, he has undoubtedly made life all the worse for OUR families all across this once great nation.

_**Enough is enough!**_ Americans must recognize that we cannot have one more year of Biden. It is my wish this Christmas and the wishes of patriots everywhere in Texas and beyond, that **at this time next year, what we need is a new president-elect,_our true president, Donald J. Trump._** How wonderful it would be to gather around the fireplace in December, knowing that the future of our families is finally in capable hands...

So join me this Christmas, in standing together united in the hope that one year from today, we can proudly say that Donald Trump will be our president again, and our families can rejoice in a future that looks just as bright as the lights that surround us on Christmas day.

_Peter, __[together we can save Christmas for the next four years, will you give a gift of joy this year, and support my fight to make America great again?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=f290a1d75e&e=c982eb7ad4)_
---
| [GIVE A GIFT, FOR A BRIGHTER 2024](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=548d60e33b&e=c982eb7ad4 "GIVE A GIFT, FOR A BRIGHTER 2024")
---
| [MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=dff37da0fa&e=c982eb7ad4 "MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD")
---
|
---
|
Merry Christmas America,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=aa1ff0f741&e=c982eb7ad4)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MERRY CHRISTMAS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
A Christmas message from your favorite President.| | |
---
| | Patriot,

---
Today, I am not going to talk about the sad state of our country.
---
It’s Christmas Eve – _a time for hope and faith_.
---
The Christmas season reminds us that our faith is not in vain. Our hopes will be fulfilled with everlasting joy.
---
While we may not see it right now, there is always a light that shines in the darkness.
---
I have faith that by next Christmas, we will be closing this dark chapter in American history and our glorious nation will be back on the path to GREATNESS!
---
---
Thank you, God bless you, and NEVER lose hope!
---
---

name: Derek Marshall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:

Happy Holidays, Peter! As the year winds down and families gather all over, I want to take this moment to personally thank you for all your support over the last year. This year has shown once again just how important it is that we take back the House majority in 2024. Thank you for being on this journey alongside me. We did the impossible before, and we'll continue doing it again in 2024. So, from my family to yours, thank you for having our backs, and we hope you have a safe and happy holiday. Thank you, Kim

Friend.

I just wanted to send you a quick note on behalf of my family, my campaign team, and myself to express my heartfelt **thanks for your amazing support this year.**

As we celebrate the Holiday season, I hope you're surrounded by joy, laughter, and the warmth of loved ones. Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a joyful holiday season!

I’m excited to see all that our team can accomplish in the year ahead. With you on our team, I’m more confident than ever that we’ll be able to win re-election, flip the House in 2024, and put some coal in some MAGA stockings.

Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year,

Dr. Raul Ruiz

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: From our family to yours
body:
Dear Friends,

As we settle into the holiday season, my family and I are grateful for the time to celebrate, reflect, and prepare for what's ahead.

Looking back on 2023, this has been a remarkable year. We've achieved significant legislative victories for working families and secured funding for critical projects in our community. Additionally, I've taken on new leadership roles in the caucus as the House Majority Whip and as Vice Chair of the Capital Budget on the Appropriations Committee. Most importantly, my wife and I welcomed a new baby girl this fall.

As we look forward to 2024, we're excited to face the challenges and celebrate the triumphs that the new year will bring. I'm genuinely optimistic about the possibilities that lie around the corner, and it's your unwavering support that fuels my hope and determination. Together, there's no limit to what we can achieve.

I wish you a holiday season filled with joy, safety, and happiness. Here's to an amazing 2024!

Warm regards ,

Jazz

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife, son and daughter.
By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Wishing you and your loved ones a happy, healthy holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
A walking, barking, four-legged reminder.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1870%2E4032634%2EkhmFCg)
---
One movie keeps coming to mind this holiday season — and not just because I’ve got a walking, barking, four-legged reminder of it at home. Bruce and I named our dog Bailey after George Bailey, the community banker in _It’s A Wonderful Life._ He was decent, he was determined, and, most of all, he saw the best in people. I always thought his role was written for a golden retriever, although Jimmy Stewart did a nice job with it. We had hoped that our Bailey would be as kind and loyal as the fictional George Bailey — and that he would also stand up to Big Bank executives just like his namesake, but we know that dogs can only do so much. And when I think about George Bailey’s big-hearted grit, I think about all the Americans who dig deep every day to take care of the people they love and strengthen our communities. Everyone who’s taking two buses to their second job. Everyone who’s taking time this holiday season to volunteer at a food bank. Everyone who’s squaring their shoulders, clearing their throats, and speaking out to insist that our nation live up to its best values. I’m grateful for them — and I’m grateful for you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for making this team stronger. And thank you for channeling your inner George Bailey (let’s keep an eye out for any Mr. Potters). Bruce, Bailey, and I are wishing you and your loved ones a happy, healthy, _wonderful_ holiday season. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

Fellow American,

On this Christmas Eve, I hope you are experiencing all the joys of the holidays with your family, friends, and loved ones. It’s been an incredible year for me, my family, and this campaign for President.

Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
Merry Christmas!

I hope that you have the opportunity to spend time with your family this
weekend, and to thank the Lord for His gift of salvation.

We know that a lot can get lost in the hustle and bustle of the holiday
season, especially with campaigns in full swing, and a primary right around
the corner. That's why it's important to take a moment and reflect on the
blessings that God has given us.

We know that this country is on the wrong track, and that those who have
gotten us into this mess aren't going to get us out of it. But we also know
that there is hope. As the Bible says in Matthew 1:21, “She will give birth
to a son, and you will call him Jesus, because he will save his people from
their sins.” May the Lord save this great nation, and may He bless your
family this Christmas.

This campaign will be back in full swing right after Christmas - more
meetings, events <https://www.luccifortexas.com/events>, and block walking
through the March 5th Primary. In fact, we're going to walk a full marathon
(26.2 miles) knocking on doors in Arlington this Thursday. If you have any
time to spare, we're looking for volunteers to join me in shifts! Just
reply to this email, and we'll work out the details.

God bless you and Merry Christmas!

[image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png]

*PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know.*
--
*--*
*Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25*
Matthew@LucciForTexas <Matthew@LucciForTexas.com>
(682) 220-9925
*www.LucciForTexas.com <http://www.luccifortexas.com/>*

Just reply to this email, and we'll work out the details. God bless you and Merry Christmas! [image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png] PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know. -- -- Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25 Matthew@LucciForTexas <Matthew@LucciForTexas.com> (682) 220-9925 www.LucciForTexas.com <>

name: Hill Harper
subject: Spice 🐶
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I’m constantly being blown away by the support we’ve experienced.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231224&t=1&akid=754%2E62735%2E2oYh2x)
Hey Peter, it’s Hill and I have a special guest 👋🏾:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231224?amount=5&refcode=em20231224-754&refcode2=754_62735_2oYh2x&akid=754%2E62735%2E2oYh2x)
This is me and my pup, Spice 🐶, and we wanted to wish you happy holidays!
For me the holiday season is always a time to reflect and express gratitude.
Since we launched our Senate campaign this year, I’ve been constantly blown away by the amount of support we get from folks just like you.
**Thank you for making this journey so amazing. Thank you for believing in our campaign, and in me!**
I know that a lot of us are facing hard times. Inflation is high, workers’ rights are under attack, and a lot of us are feeling squeezed by the state of the economy and disillusioned with where our country has been going.
**I don’t take it for granted for one minute what your support means. Any contribution you’ve made has made a huge difference already. And even just opening and reading emails like this goes a long way.**
With that both myself and Spice have an ask for you: **[Before you officially log off for the holidays, can you donate $5 or more today to help us reach our $50,000 fundraising goal by the FEC deadline on December 31?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231224?amount=5&refcode=em20231224-754&refcode2=754_62735_2oYh2x&akid=754%2E62735%2E2oYh2x) **
Cheers and happy holidays!
Sincerely,
Hill + Spice 🐶
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231224&t=2&refcode2=754_62735_2oYh2x&akid=754%2E62735%2E2oYh2x)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=754%2E62735%2E2oYh2x)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=754%2E62735%2E2oYh2x)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Katie Britt
subject: Merry Christmas, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Peter,

Wesley, Bennett, Ridgeway, and I want to wish a very Merry Christmas to you
and your family.

This Christmas, we are all reflecting on our many blessings, especially God’s
gift of His son, Jesus Christ, to save our world.

As Isaiah 9:6 says, “For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given: and
the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called
Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of
Peace.”

Merry Christmas, Peter. Thank you for your support. May the Lord’s light shine
on you this Christmas Day.

Sincerely,

Senator Katie Britt

Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

| | On behalf of all of us here at Team Christie, we'd like to wish you a Merry Christmas. Your support has made a difference all the way through this campaign, but we're just getting started. The greatest gift we can give to our fellow man is compassion and service – that's what Chris is all about, and it's why he's running. Being an American is a gift, and we are thankful for everyone who has pitched in to help Chris get the truth out and WIN for America. Thank you for your continued support during this Christmas season. We wish you all a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year. From our families to yours,

The Christie Family

Merry Christmas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/34044aeaca93/ywzzqebcuo?e=cc1921084c)

| | Friend, As we gather with our families and loved ones to celebrate the joyous occasion of Christmas, I am reminded of the values that unite our community. The birth of Jesus Christ teaches us about the importance of love, compassion, and unity, making us all part of one large human family.

This season of reflection and family bonding fills me with hope for a future where our community thrives under shared traditions. I am committed to being the representative who upholds these values, working towards a future of unity and prosperity for all.

Wishing you and your family a Merry Christmas and a New Year filled with promise and anticipation.
---
| Merry Christmas,

| Peter,

I wanted to take a second to extend my gratitude for your support of my campaign. In a year filled with ups and downs, supporters like you were a constant reminder of the importance of fighting for the issues we most care about. I look forward to what we can achieve together in 2024.

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: 🎄 Merry Christmas, and thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105722/images/Christmas%20Logo.png]
’Twas the night before Christmas, in the heartland so dear,
United Rural Democrats, spreading hope and good cheer.
The yard signs were placed on the lawns with great care,
In hopes that voters soon would be there.

The candidates nestled all snug in their beds,
While visions of policy changes danced in their heads.
And Biden in his office, and Kamala at her desk,
Had just settled in for a political quest.

When out on the porch there arose such a clatter,
I sprang from my chair to see what was the matter.
Away to the window, I flew like a flash,
Tore open the shutters, threw up the sash.

The moon on the breast of the newly mowed lawn,
Gave a luster of hope to the signs in the dawn.
When what to my wondering eyes should’ve done it,
But a herd of candidates, spreading their lit!

With Jon Tester leading, so lively and quick,
I knew in a moment, he must be our pick.
More rapid than eagles, the canvassers they came,
And he whistled and shouted and called them by name.

"Now, Kelly ! Now, Schatz ! Now, Casey and Coons !
On, Baldwin ! On, Bennet ! On, Sherrod and Kim !
To the doors of the voters, let’s spread the good news,
For a brighter, more just future, that’s what we choose!"

Thank you all for a wonderful 2023. We’re looking forward to an eventful 2024 where we work harder than ever to flip the U.S. House, hold the Senate, and, of course, give President Biden and Vice President Harris a second term.

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays,

Your friends at United Rural Democrats
United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail&recurring=true]
PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Y7szl2shaUe1fBwHtDYj7A2?unsubscribedata=1OaPnpnXWD6IQUBO8ndjBbFJvC9ZVcFvT5ou05PoProM5KH7JGFDpulQP4GTspdCYvjxHqX4QZuZnm2%2Fxs31fVsavCnLnxysS8reh9SqP74wpALuJB9nPBUB07KnJoFntATd5dSt8rm9oosgFBfTRVgk1kod9Ci5x344Af6bL4SOA2DX0BhOQPoCIxqvvv4dMuWgfd%2FJGE6ucoxX5s%2BD52TXBMzWhuhzrN0tQSLlxgfrHeTfh92zoLLa3ZklgvBznGDsyAL3tqtFrqWPenxsnanI12Fai8btOaWSswowANQ6oBJ77v67Hh2U3YJgJ86Qrg0oyGp%2FEFDMWg8wrC3ESnyFBjI3gSNPxdzcs5d1meZHClIpT8s5GsXbFCpZ9nu7qdZZNsYGnqypPs2FPVbLuf4vRPPLYko6emjGTyAZIfUBPIll7tdU7skctft0kXXR] . name: Qasim Rashid
subject: A Christmas message of hope and unity from Qasim Rashid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=34582%2E120265%2EVdT7p_ ]Qasim for Congress

Hi, Friend,

On this Christmas Eve, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for your
unwavering support during these challenging times.

As we face the horrors of war in the Middle East, threats to our democracy
at home, and economic uncertainty for tens of millions of Americans, let
us remember the importance of unity, justice, and compassion.

In these difficult times, I'm reminded of the wisdom of James Baldwin, who
said, "I never have been in despair about the world. I’ve been enraged by
it. I don’t think I’m in despair. I can’t afford despair. I can’t tell my
nephew, my niece. You can’t tell the children there’s no hope."

This holiday season, let us embrace hope and extend the spirit of unity to
our entire community and beyond. Extend a helping hand to those in need,
call that old friend you haven't spoken to in a while to check in on them
and let's continue to work for a fairer and more equal society. Justice
coupled with compassion—that is our moral imperative.

From my family to yours, Merry Christmas. May the spirit of unity,
justice, and compassion fill your hearts.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4291?t=1002&akid=34582%2E120265%2EVdT7p_ ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

With hope,

— Qasim Rashid

Donate to our campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qr-em-footer?t=1003&refcode2=34582_120265_VdT7p_&akid=34582%2E120265%2EVdT7p_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=34582%2E120265%2EVdT7p_
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=34582%2E120265%2EVdT7p_

| _**Merry Christmas!**_** ** 🎄 The rumor at the North Pole is that Santa’s sleigh will be a little lighter this year. And I can’t blame him; Bidenomics** and the terrible policies enacted by our elected officials have increased the cost of everything.** It’s no wonder that even Saint Nick is feeling the pinch.

The combined cost for the dozen gifts featured in the final verse of “The Twelve Days of Christmas” has reached an all-time high of $46,730. That's $1,207 higher than last year’s price tag – and a 19.8% increase since President Joe Biden took office, according to the 40th annual [PNC Christmas Price Index](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=852f862174&e=fc26432468).

While most of us won’t be impacted by the 25% price hike in the price of two turtle doves, _my wallet is quite a bit lighter this Christmas because of the nearly 63% [increase in the cost](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=af1e798f17&e=fc26432468) of buying a bag of basic grocery store staples_ like bread, milk, toilet paper, and laundry detergent since last year. And I bet yours is, too.

Christmas is both a blessing and a struggle for so many of us. **_As a kid, I watched my mom use layaway plans and pick up side jobs cleaning houses so my sister and I would have presents under the tree._**

That’s one of the memories that motivates me to _fight to make life easier and more affordable for every American_.

As an economist, I understand that **inflation is caused by failed government policies**. Washington must _stop printing money to pay for wasteful and unconstitutional government programs_. Americans can’t afford for Congress to continue artificially increasing the price at the pump and the cost of electric bills by _limiting our domestic energy production in the name of green virtue signaling_.

As a taxpayer watchdog, columnist, and advisor to federal lawmakers at some of America’s most influential conservative organizations, **_I’ve saved taxpayers more than $60 billion_** by exposing waste, fraud, and abuse of YOUR tax dollars and working with lawmakers to slash wasteful spending.

**As a member of Congress, I will respect your money and make damn sure that every dollar is spent carefully.**

I have one Christmas wish this year: your support for our campaign.

Your generous contribution will empower us to share our message of fiscal conservatism, individual empowerment, and limited government with every corner of our district. Please visit [www.DrewForNevada.com](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=010dc8bc00&e=fc26432468) today. If you prefer to send your contribution by mail, please send a check to **Drew for Nevada, 5325 S. Fort Apache Road, Suite D-31, Las Vegas, NV 89148**.

_December 31 is a CRUCIAL fundraising deadline, so please help us meet our year-end goals._

Let's make a difference together this Christmas. Regardless of the amount, your contribution will play a vital role in building a more fiscally responsible future for our children and grandchildren.

If Bidenomics has left you unable to contribute to our campaign financially, please consider volunteering your time or hosting an event by signing up at [https://drewfornevada.com/volunteer/](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=3f860a610e&e=fc26432468).

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our shared American values. Sarah and I wish you and yours a Christmas filled with warmth and love.
---
| | | | | | [](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=cee59cd233&e=fc26432468)
---
| | [](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=b5885dc6f4&e=fc26432468)
---
| | [](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=9186c8ffa1&e=fc26432468)
