|
---
| PS - If you know someone who would be interested in learning more about my campaign to flip NV-03, please [forward them this email](https://us14.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=cf554675d4&e=fc26432468).

As always, thank you for your [continued support of our campaign](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=5190e3ad2f&e=fc26432468)! No matter the amount -- whether it's $5, $55, or $500 -- every dollar makes a difference!
---
|
---
|
# _**Drew Supports Constitutional Term Limits**_
Drew has joined with U.S. Term Limits to sign the Term Limits Pledge. Once elected, Drew will cosponsor and vote for the U.S. Term Limits Amendment limiting House members to 3 terms and Senators to 2 terms.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#
_**On the Campaign Trail**_
---
| Drew was a featured guest this year at **Turning Point USA's** **America Fest 2023** in Phoenix! Drew spoke about his background as a government watchdog and taxpayer advocate with thousands of like-minded patriots in attendance.
---
|
---
| Drew was honored to attend the grand opening and ribbon cutting for [**Power2Parent's**](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=c30d7bb285&e=fc26432468) brand new office in Southern Nevada! Power2Parent is a parental rights organization that fights to ensure all students have access to a high-quality education that fits their learning needs.
---
|
---
---
| Drew and Sarah attended the **American for Prosperity Nevada's **End of Year Gala. Nevada is blessed to have AFP NV's passionate leadership team, including Ronnie Najarro and Wiz Rouzard, as well as their army of inspiring volunteers fighting to advance liberty, limited government, and the American Dream.
---
|
---
|
#
_**In the Media**_
---
| Drew appeared on **Live & Local** with **Dr. Laurence Schiff** on KZZZ 94.1 FM. They spoke about inflation, school choice, and everyone's favorite... the Golden Knights! Dr. Schiff's radio show reaches the southern area of Nevada's 3rd congressional district, including Laughlin, Palm Gardens, Cal-Nev-Ari, and Searchlight.
---
|
---
|
---
| Last, but certainly not least, Drew was profiled by** _ _**_**Star News Digital Media**_! Here are some excerpts from the article, which you can find **[HERE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=c1ab8e6c22&e=fc26432468)**

“I am very proud that I was able to make government less expensive,” Drew told the** **_Star News**, **_adding that “**people make better decisions about their lives than government** ” and “dictating people’s lives at the government level is not the best way to solve things.”

“The rate of inflation in Clark County, in the Las Vegas metro area, is much higher even than the rest of the country.” Drew continued, “[A]nd one of the reasons why things are worse is because **our housing prices, and as a result our rent prices, are skyrocketing because the federal government owns 89 percent of Clark County**.”

Drew stressed, “One of the things I am going to fight for is to **put Nevada’s land back in the hands of Nevadans**.”

Speaking in opposition to social media censorship Drew said, “**There’s no place for using power gained through political favoritism to silence what Americans see, to silence Americans’ views**. It’s just so fundamentally anti-American, it disgusts me.”

**Click the image below** to read the whole thing!
---
| [ ](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=9a88ddd2a9&e=fc26432468)
---
|
---
|
# _YOU Can Help Us Defeat Susie Lee!_
Want to help Drew? This race is going to be tight, and having the help of supporters like you is the only way we can win!

Here are the **_TOP 3_ ways _YOU_ can get involved:**

1. **Donate: **Simply chipping in a few dollars to support our efforts is incredibly helpful. Whether it's $3 or $3,000, every donation makes a _huge_ difference! Just $18 buys coffee and donuts for volunteers! **You can contribute to the campaign [HERE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=767d90a05d&e=fc26432468)**.

2. **Host a Meet-and-Greet for Drew** : Hosting a Meet-and-Greet in your home for Drew and inviting your friends, family, and neighbors is one of the _best ways to spread our message_. Whether it’s a casual coffee meeting, a wine and cheese event, or an energetic Golden Knights watch party, we can make hosting a get-together fun and easy. Interested in hosting a Meet-and-Greet? Email [linnea@drewfornevada.com](mailto:linnea@drewfornevada.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20host%20a%20Meet%20%26%20Greet%20for%20Drew!).

3. **Volunteer for the Campaign:** #TeamDrew is the secret weapon that will get Drew elected to Congress. We need to knock on tens of thousands of doors, write thousands of postcards, and make as many phone calls as possible to make this campaign a success...and we can't do it without you! Please visit** **[THIS](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=546db19451&e=fc26432468) link to join #TeamDrew as a volunteer.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75758640/445658614/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231224_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3MTMzMzQtOWNhMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jWKw1yEvx2T84RXgPuwQfI6G6D40LuKzmoJeZEW7_-Q=)
---
Folks — I had to reach out to tell you this: **Thank you.** Truly, your support means the world to our entire team. Just before we headed out of the office to celebrate with our loved ones, this team helped us cross **$100,000** raised in online grassroots contributions this quarter. **That’s huge.** I’m so proud of the team we’ve built together. Over 5,500 folks have stepped up to make a contribution — meaning we really aren’t relying on endless checks from private, dark money donors with an agenda. **Our average contribution was less than $21 bucks this quarter.** I do want to make sure I’m clear — 2024 will be one of, if not the most expensive election cycle we’ve seen this far. The national Republican fundraising machine has already raised nearly $10 million dollars this year to flood battleground states like ours with the message of the MAGA right. But I’ll let you in on a secret, friend — this team is strong, and with so much on the line next year, I know we’ll be able to build the coalition in takes to defeat the extremism on the right. **So again****— thank you. Thanks for pitching in, signing a petition, or even reading this message this far. I’m truly grateful you’re in this fight with us.** I hope you’re having a safe and happy holiday season! — Morgan Dick Executive Director, Arizona Democratic Party [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75758641/445658615/1907298925?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231224_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3MTMzMzQtOWNhMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jWKw1yEvx2T84RXgPuwQfI6G6D40LuKzmoJeZEW7_-Q=) | | Team — We really can’t do any of this work without the support of grassroots donors like yourself. Next year each battle will be bigger than ever, and we have to make sure we have a strong foundation in order to win every single one. [**If you’re able to before the end of the year, please consider chipping in to help us fight for Democrats up and down the ballot in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75758642/445658616/1907298925?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231224_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3MTMzMzQtOWNhMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jWKw1yEvx2T84RXgPuwQfI6G6D40LuKzmoJeZEW7_-Q=) | [PITCH IN $24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75758643/445658617/1907298925?amount=24&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_TYE_AC60_20231224_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3MTMzMzQtOWNhMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jWKw1yEvx2T84RXgPuwQfI6G6D40LuKzmoJeZEW7_-Q=)

subject: Merry Christmas!
body:

Dear Peter,
As we gather with family and friends to celebrate this Christmas season, let us all take a moment to reflect upon the true meaning of Christmas.

As Isaiah said, “For to us a child is born, to us a son is given.”

Let us all be grateful for our lord and savior Jesus Christ and may the blessings of Christmas be upon us all.

As I think back to my own childhood, Christmas was always my favorite time of the year, in part because of our family traditions and because it was also my Dad’s birthday.

clean_body: | | | | It’s time to celebrate | Dear Peter, As we gather with family and friends to celebrate this Christmas season, let us all take a moment to reflect upon the true meaning of Christmas. As Isaiah said, “For to us a child is born, to us a son is given.” Let us all be grateful for our lord and savior Jesus Christ and may the blessings of Christmas be upon us all. As I think back to my own childhood, Christmas was always my favorite time of the year, in part because of our family traditions and because it was also my Dad’s birthday. This year, as Doina and I celebrate our second Christmas with Julianna, we look forward to creating our own traditions and memories that she will hold dear in the years to come. Doina and I wish you and your families a very Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! | | Thank you, Rep. Mike Lawler NY-17 | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

For a better future, there's no time to waste.

Great news, team: Dr. Anthony Fauci's birthday is today, and **we want YOU to sign our official card!**

Dr. Fauci devoted his entire career to serving our country. As he celebrates his first full year retired from government work, it's the _perfect opportunity_ to express our gratitude -- that's why we're hoping to get 50,000 signatures from top supporters like you before we send the card.

**But we still haven't heard from you, and we need to get your signature on the card by midnight!**

**From:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.dscc.org/go/16722?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231224-SigntheCard-FauciBirthday23-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231224-SigntheCard-FauciBirthday23-Pros-sl1&akid=12965%2E9716520%2E4yN_er)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?John?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
My Christmas greeting from my family to yours | | | | |
---
Dear friend,
As the holiday season is upon us, I want to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones. May this Christmas bring joy, peace, and goodwill, and may the coming year be filled with prosperity and success.
In a world that often feels engulfed in turmoil, it's easy to feel helpless; yet, the true essence of Christmas reminds us that God is with us—Emmanuel. This is the true reason of the season and what instills hope in our hearts.
Please see my Christmas Eve message [here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=367168227d&e=1b1fb1ad9f) or below:
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=c1e07b4647&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Warm regards,
John TeichertCandidate for U.S. Senate
|
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Teichert for Senate PO Box 3782 1296 Cronson Blvd Crofton, MD 21114-3782 USA

name: Rick Scott
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
Peter,

I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas!

As we celebrate, I hope you have a special day full of tradition and
celebration with family and loved ones.

I’m so incredibly grateful to have the opportunity to represent the free state
of Florida in the Senate, and I can’t wait to get to work next year defending
the Sunshine State.

Thank you,
Rick Scott

Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida

Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions
for Federal income tax purposes.

subject: Merry Christmas, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
>From Kristi and I to you

Friend,

Kristi and I would like to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas!

In the three months since I’ve gotten into this race, I’ve been extremely
grateful for the outpouring of support I’ve received from across our country.

Whether you’re having a white Christmas, a green Christmas, or something in
between, thank you for your faith in me and support of my campaign.

I can’t wait to get to work for you.

Merry Christmas, Friend.

Sincerely,

Mike Rogers

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Christmas Message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America.

|
---
| | | **Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_message_2nd&n=1)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_message_2nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_message_2nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
No matter what your faith tradition is, or is not, Christmas is a time to stop and consider the universal longings we all share together: hope, joy, peace, and goodwill to all.
Binding us all together is love, because love unites and it recognizes we are endowed by our Creator with dignity and honor.
These values I learned from my grandmother Rose. Many of you learned similar values from family and friends–many of whom lived though extremely tough times.
**My grandmother’s testimony is still valid today, and I hope you are inspired to imagine an America that values all, includes all, and welcomes all.**
Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---

Binding us all together is love, because love unites and it recognizes we are endowed by our Creator with dignity and honor. These values I learned from my grandmother Rose. Many of you learned similar values from family and friends–many of whom lived though extremely tough times. My grandmother’s testimony is still valid today, and I hope you are inspired to imagine an America that values all, includes all, and welcomes all. Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America. | | Sincerely, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. | | |

Peter, You are one of President Biden’s key supporters -- and we’re so grateful to have you on our team. But right now, we need your help.

As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe relentlessly with negative campaign ads in battleground states across the country. And Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists are doing _everything_ they can to dismantle the progress we’ve made and retake the White House.

**The only way we can fight back is with folks like you by our side.**

If everyone reading this chipped in $25, we'd have the resources we need to win this race. But not everyone gives, so we’re hoping we can count on you.
